 ❯ Continue Session 47 for Scout. Read SCOUT_PLAN.md and CLAUDE.md for current state. Last session (46) we shipped 5 features: leadership change monitoring (8 superintendent turnovers found), RFP monitoring
 (Code Combat-relevant filtering), legislative signal scanner (TX + IL CS mandates), territory map visualization (Folium HTML), and Board Docs noise filtering. Signal system is at 10 sources, 16 commands. Next:
 check Tulsa PS bond vote result (April 7 — should have results now), verify Google Alert parser handles new keyword sections (~April 9 digest), enhance territory map with richer popups (enrollment, school
 count, licenses), then continue building unbuilt prospecting strategies — AI Algebra launch campaign (#23), Cybersecurity pre-launch (#24), grant-funded prospecting (#20), budget cycle targeting (#21).

 2627 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────
 2628 + # GRANT-FUNDED PROSPECTING SCANNER (Serper + Claude)
 2629 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────
 2630 +
 2631 + def scan_grant_opportunities ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2632 + """

 2633 + Scan for K- 12 districts that received or are applying for CS/STEM/CTE grants.

 2634 + Targets: Title IV-A, Perkins V (CTE), state STEM grants, NSF awards, private foundation grants.

 2635 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2636 + """

 2637 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2638 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan grants" )

 2639 + return []

 2640 +

 2641 + import httpx

 2642 +

 2643 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2644 + _load_cross_references()

 2645 +

 2646 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2647 + all_snippets = []

 2648 + seen_urls = set ()

 2649 +

 2650 + if progress_callback:

 2651 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for STEM/CS grant awards..." )

 2652 +

 2653 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2654 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2655 + queries = [

 2656 + f'"grant" ("awarded" OR "received" OR "funded") ("computer science" OR "STEM" OR "CTE") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 2657 + f'("Title IV" OR "Perkins" OR "STEM grant" OR "CTE grant") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 2658 + ]

 2659 + for query in queries:

 2660 + try :

 2661 + resp = httpx.post(

 2662 + SERPER_URL,

 2663 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 2664 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2665 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2666 + )

 2667 + data = resp.json()

 2668 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2669 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2670 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2671 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2672 + all_snippets.append({

 2673 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2674 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2675 + "url" : url,

 2676 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2677 + })

 2678 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2679 + except Exception as e:

 2680 + logger.warning( f"Serper grant scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2681 +

 2682 + if not all_snippets:

 2683 + logger.info( "Grant scan: no results found" )

 2684 + if progress_callback:

 2685 + progress_callback( "Grant scan: no results found." )

 2686 + return []

 2687 +

 2688 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2689 +

 2690 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2691 + combined_text = ""

 2692 + for s in all_snippets:

 2693 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2694 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2695 +

 2696 + if progress_callback:

 2697 + progress_callback( f"Extracting grant signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2698 +

 2699 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2700 + import anthropic

 2701 + try :

 2702 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2703 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district grant awards and funding relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum from these search results.

 2704 +

 2705 + INCLUDE only:

 2706 + - Districts receiving grants for computer science, coding, STEM, CTE, or technology curriculum

 2707 + - Title IV-A well-rounded education grants used for CS/STEM

 2708 + - Perkins V CTE grants for CS/tech pathways

 2709 + - State STEM/CS education grants

 2710 + - NSF or private foundation grants for K- 12 CS/STEM programs

 2711 + - Districts announcing they will USE grant funds for CS/STEM/CTE

 2712 +

 2713 + EXCLUDE:

 2714 + - Construction/facilities grants (even if labeled "STEM building" )

 2715 + - Device/hardware-only grants ( 1 : 1 laptop, Chromebook)

 2716 + - Generic education grants not specific to CS/STEM/CTE

 2717 + - Grants to colleges or universities

 2718 + - Grants for non-education entities

 2719 + - E-Rate (telecom/internet infrastructure)

 2720 +

 2721 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2722 + {{

 2723 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2724 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2725 + "grant_type" : "Title IV-A | Perkins V | state_stem | nsf | private_foundation | other" ,

 2726 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2727 + "what_its_for" : "1 sentence: what the grant funds" ,

 2728 + "headline" : "Grant: [district] receives [amount] for [purpose]"

 2729 + }}

 2730 +

 2731 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2732 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2733 +

 2734 + Search results:

 2735 + {combined_text} """

 2736 +

 2737 + response = client.messages.create(

 2738 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2739 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2740 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2741 + )

 2742 + _track_usage(response)

 2743 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2744 + except Exception as e:

 2745 + logger.error( f"Claude grant extraction failed: {e} " )

 2746 + return []

 2747 +

 2748 + # Parse JSON

 2749 + try :

 2750 + clean = raw_text

 2751 + if "```" in clean:

 2752 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2753 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2754 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2755 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2756 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2757 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2758 + logger.warning( "Grant scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2759 + return []

 2760 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2761 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2762 + logger.warning( f"Grant scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2763 + return []

 2764 +

 2765 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2766 + signals = []

 2767 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2768 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2769 +

 2770 + for item in items:

 2771 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2772 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2773 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2774 + continue

 2775 +

 2776 + # NCES validation

 2777 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2778 + if nces_state:

 2779 + state = nces_state

 2780 +

 2781 + # Dedup by district + grant type

 2782 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2783 + grant_type = (item.get( "grant_type" ) or "other" ).strip().lower()

 2784 + dedup_key = (norm_district, grant_type)

 2785 + if dedup_key in dedup_seen:

 2786 + continue

 2787 + dedup_seen.add(dedup_key)

 2788 +

 2789 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2790 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2791 + heat = compute_heat_score( "grant" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2792 +

 2793 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f"Grant: {district} ( {state} )" ).strip()

 2794 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2795 + msg_id = f"grant_ {norm_district} _ {grant_type} _ {year_month} "

 2796 +

 2797 + signals.append({

 2798 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 2799 + "source" : "grant_scan" ,

 2800 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {grant_type} " ,

 2801 + "signal_type" : "grant" ,

 2802 + "scope" : "district" ,

 2803 + "district" : district,

 2804 + "state" : state,

 2805 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 2806 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 2807 + "tier" : 1 ,

 2808 + "heat_score" : heat,

 2809 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 2810 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 2811 + "url" : "" ,

 2812 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 2813 + })

 2814 +

 2815 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} CS/STEM grant signals extracted "

 2816 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 2817 + if progress_callback:

 2818 + progress_callback( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 2819 + return signals

 2820 +

 2821 +

 2822 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2823 + # BUDGET CYCLE TARGETING SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 2824 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2825 +

 2826 + def scan_budget_cycle_signals ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2827 + """

 2828 + Scan for K- 12 districts in active budget/procurement cycles for CS/STEM/CTE.

 2829 + Targets: budget approvals, curriculum adoption cycles, technology refresh plans,

 2830 + board-approved spending for CS/STEM programs.

 2831 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2832 + """

 2833 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2834 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan budget cycles" )

 2835 + return []

 2836 +

 2837 + import httpx

 2838 +

 2839 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2840 + _load_cross_references()

 2841 +

 2842 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2843 + all_snippets = []

 2844 + seen_urls = set ()

 2845 +

 2846 + if progress_callback:

 2847 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for budget/procurement signals..." )

 2848 +

 2849 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2850 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2851 + queries = [

 2852 + f'"budget" ("approved" OR "adopted" OR "proposed") ("computer science" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "technology") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 2853 + f'("curriculum adoption" OR "technology plan" OR "procurement" OR "technology refresh") ("CS" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "coding") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 2854 + ]

 2855 + for query in queries:

 2856 + try :

 2857 + resp = httpx.post(

 2858 + SERPER_URL,

 2859 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 2860 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2861 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2862 + )

 2863 + data = resp.json()

 2864 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2865 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2866 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2867 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2868 + all_snippets.append({

 2869 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2870 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2871 + "url" : url,

 2872 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2873 + })

 2874 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2875 + except Exception as e:

 2876 + logger.warning( f"Serper budget scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2877 +

 2878 + if not all_snippets:

 2879 + logger.info( "Budget scan: no results found" )

 2880 + if progress_callback:

 2881 + progress_callback( "Budget scan: no results found." )

 2882 + return []

 2883 +

 2884 + logger.info( f"Budget scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2885 +

 2886 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2887 + combined_text = ""

 2888 + for s in all_snippets:

 2889 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2890 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2891 +

 2892 + if progress_callback:

 2893 + progress_callback( f"Extracting budget signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2894 +

 2895 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2896 + import anthropic

 2897 + try :

 2898 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2899 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district budget and procurement signals relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum purchasing from these search results.

 2900 +

 2901 + INCLUDE only:

 2902 + - Districts approving budgets that include CS/STEM/CTE curriculum spending

 2903 + - Districts in curriculum adoption cycles for computer science, STEM, or CTE

 2904 + - Technology refresh/replacement plans that include instructional software

 2905 + - Board-approved spending for CS/STEM/CTE programs or professional development

 2906 + - Districts announcing they are evaluating or selecting CS/STEM curriculum vendors

 2907 +

 2908 + EXCLUDE:

 2909 + - General budget news without CS/STEM/CTE specifics

 2910 + - Construction/facilities budgets (even if "STEM building" )

 2911 + - Device-only purchases (laptops, Chromebooks, hardware)

 2912 + - ERP/payroll/admin system purchases

 2913 + - Assessment platform purchases

 2914 + - LMS/SIS purchases

 2915 + - Budget cuts or layoffs (unless reallocating TO CS/STEM)

 2916 +

 2917 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2918 + {{

 2919 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2920 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2921 + "budget_signal" : "budget_approved | curriculum_adoption | tech_plan | procurement | vendor_evaluation" ,

 2922 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2923 + "timeline" : "FY2026 | Spring 2026 | Fall 2026 | unknown" ,

 2924 + "what_theyre_buying" : "1 sentence: what CS/STEM/CTE they are buying or planning to buy" ,

 2925 + "headline" : "[district]: [budget signal summary]"

 2926 + }}

 2927 +

 2928 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2929 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2930 +

 2931 + Search results:

 2932 + {combined_text} """

 2933 +

 2934 + response = client.messages.create(

 2935 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2936 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2937 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2938 + )

 2939 + _track_usage(response)

 2940 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2941 + except Exception as e:

 2942 + logger.error( f"Claude budget extraction failed: {e} " )

 2943 + return []

 2944 +

 2945 + # Parse JSON

 2946 + try :

 2947 + clean = raw_text

 2948 + if "```" in clean:

 2949 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2950 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2951 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2952 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2953 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2954 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2955 + logger.warning( "Budget scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2956 + return []

 2957 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2958 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2959 + logger.warning( f"Budget scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2960 + return []

 2961 +

 2962 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2963 + signals = []

 2964 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2965 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2966 +

 2967 + for item in items:

 2968 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2969 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2970 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2971 + continue

 2972 +

 2973 + # NCES validation

 2974 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2975 + if nces_state:

 2976 + state = nces_state

 2977 +

 2978 + # Dedup by district

 2979 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2980 + if norm_district in dedup_seen:

 2981 + continue

 2982 + dedup_seen.add(norm_district)

 2983 +

 2984 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2985 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2986 +

 2987 + # Budget signals use "technology" weight — districts actively spending

 2988 + heat = compute_heat_score( "technology" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2989 + # Boost for vendor evaluation (hottest signal — actively shopping)

 2990 + budget_signal = (item.get( "budget_signal" ) or "" ).strip().lower()

 2991 + if budget_signal in ( "vendor_evaluation" , "procurement" ):

 2992 + heat = min (heat + 10 , 100 )

 2993 +

 2994 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f" {district} : budget signal" ).strip()

 2995 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2996 + timeline = (item.get( "timeline" ) or "" ).strip()

 2997 + if timeline and timeline != "unknown" :

 2998 + headline = f" {headline} ( {timeline} )"

 2999 +

 3000 + msg_id = f"budget_ {norm_district} _ {year_month} "

 3001 +

 3002 + signals.append({

 3003 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 3004 + "source" : "budget_scan" ,

 3005 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {budget_signal or 'budget' } " ,

 3006 + "signal_type" : "technology" , # Closest existing type for budget/procurement

 3007 + "scope" : "district" ,

 3008 + "district" : district,

 3009 + "state" : state,

 3010 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 3011 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 3012 + "tier" : 1 ,

 3013 + "heat_score" : heat,

 3014 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 3015 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 3016 + "url" : "" ,

 3017 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 3018 + })

 3019 +

 3020 + logger.info( f"Budget scan: { len (signals)} CS/STEM budget signals extracted "

 3021 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 3022 + if progress_callback:

 3023 + progress_callback( f"Budget scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 3024 + return signals

 3025 +

 3026 +

 3027 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 3028 # RSS FEED INGESTION

 3029 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2631 + def scan_grant_opportunities ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2632 + """

 2633 + Scan for K- 12 districts that received or are applying for CS/STEM/CTE grants.

 2634 + Targets: Title IV-A, Perkins V (CTE), state STEM grants, NSF awards, private foundation grants.

 2635 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2636 + """

 2637 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2638 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan grants" )

 2639 + return []

 2640 +

 2641 + import httpx

 2642 +

 2643 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2644 + _load_cross_references()

 2646 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2647 + all_snippets = []

 2648 + seen_urls = set ()

 2650 + if progress_callback:

 2651 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for STEM/CS grant awards..." )

 2652 +

 2653 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2654 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2658 + ]

 2664 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2665 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2666 + )

 2667 + data = resp.json()

 2668 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2669 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2670 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2671 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2672 + all_snippets.append({

 2673 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2674 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2675 + "url" : url,

 2676 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2678 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2679 + except Exception as e:

 2680 + logger.warning( f"Serper grant scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2684 + if progress_callback:

 2685 + progress_callback( "Grant scan: no results found." )

 2706 + - Districts receiving grants for computer science, coding, STEM, CTE, or technology curriculum

 2707 + - Title IV-A well-rounded education grants used for CS/STEM

 2708 + - Perkins V CTE grants for CS/tech pathways

 2709 + - State STEM/CS education grants

 2710 + - NSF or private foundation grants for K- 12 CS/STEM programs

 2711 + - Districts announcing they will USE grant funds for CS/STEM/CTE

 2712 +

 2713 + EXCLUDE:

 2744 + except Exception as e:

 2750 + clean = raw_text

 2751 + if "```" in clean:

 2753 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2755 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2756 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2757 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2758 + logger.warning( "Grant scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2759 + return []

 2760 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2761 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2762 + logger.warning( f"Grant scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2763 + return []

 2764 +

 2765 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2766 + signals = []

 2767 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2768 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2769 +

 2770 + for item in items:

 2771 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2772 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2773 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2774 + continue

 2775 +

 2776 + # NCES validation

 2777 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2778 + if nces_state:

 2779 + state = nces_state

 2780 +

 2781 + # Dedup by district + grant type

 2782 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2783 + grant_type = (item.get( "grant_type" ) or "other" ).strip().lower()

 2784 + dedup_key = (norm_district, grant_type)

 2785 + if dedup_key in dedup_seen:

 2786 + continue

 2787 + dedup_seen.add(dedup_key)

 2788 +

 2789 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2790 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2791 + heat = compute_heat_score( "grant" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2792 +

 2793 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f"Grant: {district} ( {state} )" ).strip()

 2794 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2795 + msg_id = f"grant_ {norm_district} _ {grant_type} _ {year_month} "

 2796 +

 2797 + signals.append({

 2798 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 2799 + "source" : "grant_scan" ,

 2800 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {grant_type} " ,

 2801 + "signal_type" : "grant" ,

 2802 + "scope" : "district" ,

 2803 + "district" : district,

 2804 + "state" : state,

 2805 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 2806 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 2807 + "tier" : 1 ,

 2808 + "heat_score" : heat,

 2809 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 2810 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 2811 + "url" : "" ,

 2812 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 2813 + })

 2814 +

 2815 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} CS/STEM grant signals extracted "

 2816 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 2817 + if progress_callback:

 2818 + progress_callback( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 2819 + return signals

 2820 +

 2821 +

 2822 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2823 + # BUDGET CYCLE TARGETING SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 2824 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2825 +

 2826 + def scan_budget_cycle_signals ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2827 + """

 2828 + Scan for K- 12 districts in active budget/procurement cycles for CS/STEM/CTE.

 2829 + Targets: budget approvals, curriculum adoption cycles, technology refresh plans,

 2830 + board-approved spending for CS/STEM programs.

 2831 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2832 + """

 2833 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2834 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan budget cycles" )

 2835 + return []

 2836 +

 2837 + import httpx

 2838 +

 2839 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2840 + _load_cross_references()

 2841 +

 2842 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2843 + all_snippets = []

 2844 + seen_urls = set ()

 2845 +

 2846 + if progress_callback:

 2847 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for budget/procurement signals..." )

 2848 +

 2849 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2850 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2851 + queries = [

 2852 + f'"budget" ("approved" OR "adopted" OR "proposed") ("computer science" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "technology") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 2853 + f'("curriculum adoption" OR "technology plan" OR "procurement" OR "technology refresh") ("CS" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "coding") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 2854 + ]

 2855 + for query in queries:

 2856 + try :

 2857 + resp = httpx.post(

 2858 + SERPER_URL,

 2859 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 2860 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2861 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2862 + )

 2863 + data = resp.json()

 2864 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2865 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2866 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2867 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2868 + all_snippets.append({

 2869 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2870 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2871 + "url" : url,

 2872 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2873 + })

 2874 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2875 + except Exception as e:

 2876 + logger.warning( f"Serper budget scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2877 +

 2878 + if not all_snippets:

 2879 + logger.info( "Budget scan: no results found" )

 2880 + if progress_callback:

 2881 + progress_callback( "Budget scan: no results found." )

 2882 + return []

 2883 +

 2884 + logger.info( f"Budget scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2885 +

 2886 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2887 + combined_text = ""

 2888 + for s in all_snippets:

 2889 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2890 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2891 +

 2892 + if progress_callback:

 2893 + progress_callback( f"Extracting budget signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2894 +

 2895 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2896 + import anthropic

 2897 + try :

 2898 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2899 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district budget and procurement signals relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum purchasing from these search results.

 2900 +

 2901 + INCLUDE only:

 2902 + - Districts approving budgets that include CS/STEM/CTE curriculum spending

 2903 + - Districts in curriculum adoption cycles for computer science, STEM, or CTE

 2904 + - Technology refresh/replacement plans that include instructional software

 2905 + - Board-approved spending for CS/STEM/CTE programs or professional development

 2906 + - Districts announcing they are evaluating or selecting CS/STEM curriculum vendors

 2907 +

 2908 + EXCLUDE:

 2909 + - General budget news without CS/STEM/CTE specifics

 2910 + - Construction/facilities budgets (even if "STEM building" )

 2911 + - Device-only purchases (laptops, Chromebooks, hardware)

 2912 + - ERP/payroll/admin system purchases

 2913 + - Assessment platform purchases

 2914 + - LMS/SIS purchases

 2915 + - Budget cuts or layoffs (unless reallocating TO CS/STEM)

 2916 +

 2917 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2918 + {{

 2919 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2920 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2921 + "budget_signal" : "budget_approved | curriculum_adoption | tech_plan | procurement | vendor_evaluation" ,

 2922 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2923 + "timeline" : "FY2026 | Spring 2026 | Fall 2026 | unknown" ,

 2924 + "what_theyre_buying" : "1 sentence: what CS/STEM/CTE they are buying or planning to buy" ,

 2925 + "headline" : "[district]: [budget signal summary]"

 2926 + }}

 2927 +

 2928 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2929 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2930 +

 2931 + Search results:

 2932 + {combined_text} """

 2933 +

 2934 + response = client.messages.create(

 2935 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2936 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2937 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2938 + )

 2939 + _track_usage(response)

 2940 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2941 + except Exception as e:

 2942 + logger.error( f"Claude budget extraction failed: {e} " )

 2943 + return []

 2944 +

 2945 + # Parse JSON

 2946 + try :

 2947 + clean = raw_text

 2948 + if "```" in clean:

 2949 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2950 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2951 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2952 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2953 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2954 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2955 + logger.warning( "Budget scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2956 + return []

 2957 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2958 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2959 + logger.warning( f"Budget scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2960 + return []

 2961 +

 2962 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2963 + signals = []

 2964 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2965 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2966 +

 2967 + for item in items:

 2968 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2969 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2970 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2971 + continue

 2972 +

 2973 + # NCES validation

 2974 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2975 + if nces_state:

 2976 + state = nces_state

 2977 +

 2978 + # Dedup by district

 2979 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2980 + if norm_district in dedup_seen:

 2981 + continue

 2982 + dedup_seen.add(norm_district)

 2983 +

 2984 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2985 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2986 +

 2987 + # Budget signals use "technology" weight — districts actively spending

 2988 + heat = compute_heat_score( "technology" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2989 + # Boost for vendor evaluation (hottest signal — actively shopping)

 2990 + budget_signal = (item.get( "budget_signal" ) or "" ).strip().lower()

 2991 + if budget_signal in ( "vendor_evaluation" , "procurement" ):

 2992 + heat = min (heat + 10 , 100 )

 2993 +

 2994 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f" {district} : budget signal" ).strip()

 2995 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2996 + timeline = (item.get( "timeline" ) or "" ).strip()

 2997 + if timeline and timeline != "unknown" :

 2998 + headline = f" {headline} ( {timeline} )"

 2999 +

 3000 + msg_id = f"budget_ {norm_district} _ {year_month} "

 3001 +

 3002 + signals.append({

 3003 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 3004 + "source" : "budget_scan" ,

 3005 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {budget_signal or 'budget' } " ,

 3006 + "signal_type" : "technology" , # Closest existing type for budget/procurement

 3007 + "scope" : "district" ,

 3008 + "district" : district,

 3009 + "state" : state,

 3010 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 3011 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 3012 + "tier" : 1 ,

 3013 + "heat_score" : heat,

 3014 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 3015 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 3016 + "url" : "" ,

 3017 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 3018 + })

 3019 +

 3020 + logger.info( f"Budget scan: { len (signals)} CS/STEM budget signals extracted "

 3021 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 3022 + if progress_callback:

 3023 + progress_callback( f"Budget scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 3024 + return signals

 3025 +

 3026 +

 3027 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 3028 # RSS FEED INGESTION

 3029 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2627 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2628 + # GRANT-FUNDED PROSPECTING SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 2629 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2630 +

 2631 + def scan_grant_opportunities ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2632 + """

 2633 + Scan for K- 12 districts that received or are applying for CS/STEM/CTE grants.

 2634 + Targets: Title IV-A, Perkins V (CTE), state STEM grants, NSF awards, private foundation grants.

 2635 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2636 + """

 2637 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2638 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan grants" )

 2639 + return []

 2640 +

 2641 + import httpx

 2642 +

 2643 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2644 + _load_cross_references()

 2645 +

 2646 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2647 + all_snippets = []

 2648 + seen_urls = set ()

 2649 +

 2650 + if progress_callback:

 2651 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for STEM/CS grant awards..." )

 2652 +

 2653 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2654 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2655 + queries = [

 2656 + f'"grant" ("awarded" OR "received" OR "funded") ("computer science" OR "STEM" OR "CTE") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 2657 + f'("Title IV" OR "Perkins" OR "STEM grant" OR "CTE grant") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 2658 + ]

 2659 + for query in queries:

 2660 + try :

 2661 + resp = httpx.post(

 2662 + SERPER_URL,

 2663 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 2664 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2665 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2666 + )

 2667 + data = resp.json()

 2668 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2669 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2670 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2671 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2672 + all_snippets.append({

 2673 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2674 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2675 + "url" : url,

 2676 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2677 + })

 2678 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2679 + except Exception as e:

 2680 + logger.warning( f"Serper grant scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2681 +

 2682 + if not all_snippets:

 2683 + logger.info( "Grant scan: no results found" )

 2684 + if progress_callback:

 2685 + progress_callback( "Grant scan: no results found." )

 2686 + return []

 2687 +

 2688 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2689 +

 2690 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2691 + combined_text = ""

 2692 + for s in all_snippets:

 2693 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2694 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2695 +

 2696 + if progress_callback:

 2697 + progress_callback( f"Extracting grant signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2698 +

 2699 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2700 + import anthropic

 2701 + try :

 2702 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2703 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district grant awards and funding relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum from these search results.

 2704 +

 2705 + INCLUDE only:

 2706 + - Districts receiving grants for computer science, coding, STEM, CTE, or technology curriculum

 2707 + - Title IV-A well-rounded education grants used for CS/STEM

 2708 + - Perkins V CTE grants for CS/tech pathways

 2709 + - State STEM/CS education grants

 2710 + - NSF or private foundation grants for K- 12 CS/STEM programs

 2711 + - Districts announcing they will USE grant funds for CS/STEM/CTE

 2712 +

 2713 + EXCLUDE:

 2714 + - Construction/facilities grants (even if labeled "STEM building" )

 2715 + - Device/hardware-only grants ( 1 : 1 laptop, Chromebook)

 2716 + - Generic education grants not specific to CS/STEM/CTE

 2717 + - Grants to colleges or universities

 2718 + - Grants for non-education entities

 2719 + - E-Rate (telecom/internet infrastructure)

 2720 +

 2721 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2722 + {{

 2723 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2724 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2725 + "grant_type" : "Title IV-A | Perkins V | state_stem | nsf | private_foundation | other" ,

 2726 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2727 + "what_its_for" : "1 sentence: what the grant funds" ,

 2728 + "headline" : "Grant: [district] receives [amount] for [purpose]"

 2729 + }}

 2730 +

 2731 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2732 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2733 +

 2734 + Search results:

 2735 + {combined_text} """

 2736 +

 2737 + response = client.messages.create(

 2738 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2739 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2740 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2741 + )

 2742 + _track_usage(response)

 2743 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2744 + except Exception as e:

 2745 + logger.error( f"Claude grant extraction failed: {e} " )

 2746 + return []

 2747 +

 2748 + # Parse JSON

 2749 + try :

 2750 + clean = raw_text

 2751 + if "```" in clean:

 2752 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2753 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2754 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2755 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2756 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2757 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2758 + logger.warning( "Grant scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2759 + return []

 2760 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2761 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2762 + logger.warning( f"Grant scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2763 + return []

 2764 +

 2765 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2766 + signals = []

 2767 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2768 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2769 +

 2770 + for item in items:

 2771 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2772 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2773 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2774 + continue

 2775 +

 2776 + # NCES validation

 2777 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2778 + if nces_state:

 2779 + state = nces_state

 2780 +

 2781 + # Dedup by district + grant type

 2782 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2783 + grant_type = (item.get( "grant_type" ) or "other" ).strip().lower()

 2784 + dedup_key = (norm_district, grant_type)

 2785 + if dedup_key in dedup_seen:

 2786 + continue

 2787 + dedup_seen.add(dedup_key)

 2788 +

 2789 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2790 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2791 + heat = compute_heat_score( "grant" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2792 +

 2793 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f"Grant: {district} ( {state} )" ).strip()

 2794 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2795 + msg_id = f"grant_ {norm_district} _ {grant_type} _ {year_month} "

 2796 +

 2797 + signals.append({

 2798 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 2799 + "source" : "grant_scan" ,

 2800 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {grant_type} " ,

 2801 + "signal_type" : "grant" ,

 2802 + "scope" : "district" ,

 2803 + "district" : district,

 2804 + "state" : state,

 2805 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 2806 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 2807 + "tier" : 1 ,

 2808 + "heat_score" : heat,

 2809 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 2810 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 2811 + "url" : "" ,

 2812 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 2813 + })

 2814 +

 2815 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} CS/STEM grant signals extracted "

 2816 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 2817 + if progress_callback:

 2818 + progress_callback( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 2819 + return signals

 2820 +

 2823 + # BUDGET CYCLE TARGETING SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 2826 + def scan_budget_cycle_signals ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2827 + """

 2828 + Scan for K- 12 districts in active budget/procurement cycles for CS/STEM/CTE.

 2829 + Targets: budget approvals, curriculum adoption cycles, technology refresh plans,

 2830 + board-approved spending for CS/STEM programs.

 2831 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2832 + """

 2833 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2834 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan budget cycles" )

 2835 + return []

 2836 +

 2837 + import httpx

 2838 +

 2839 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2840 + _load_cross_references()

 2841 +

 2842 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2843 + all_snippets = []

 2844 + seen_urls = set ()

 2845 +

 2846 + if progress_callback:

 2847 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for budget/procurement signals..." )

 2848 +

 2849 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2850 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2851 + queries = [

 2852 + f'"budget" ("approved" OR "adopted" OR "proposed") ("computer science" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "technology") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 2853 + f'("curriculum adoption" OR "technology plan" OR "procurement" OR "technology refresh") ("CS" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "coding") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 2854 + ]

 2855 + for query in queries:

 2856 + try :

 2857 + resp = httpx.post(

 2858 + SERPER_URL,

 2859 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 2860 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2861 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2862 + )

 2863 + data = resp.json()

 2864 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2865 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2866 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2867 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2868 + all_snippets.append({

 2869 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2870 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2871 + "url" : url,

 2872 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2873 + })

 2874 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2875 + except Exception as e:

 2876 + logger.warning( f"Serper budget scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2877 +

 2878 + if not all_snippets:

 2879 + logger.info( "Budget scan: no results found" )

 2880 + if progress_callback:

 2881 + progress_callback( "Budget scan: no results found." )

 2882 + return []

 2883 +

 2884 + logger.info( f"Budget scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2885 +

 2886 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2887 + combined_text = ""

 2888 + for s in all_snippets:

 2889 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2890 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2891 +

 2892 + if progress_callback:

 2893 + progress_callback( f"Extracting budget signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2894 +

 2895 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2896 + import anthropic

 2897 + try :

 2898 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2899 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district budget and procurement signals relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum purchasing from these search results.

 2900 +

 2901 + INCLUDE only:

 2902 + - Districts approving budgets that include CS/STEM/CTE curriculum spending

 2903 + - Districts in curriculum adoption cycles for computer science, STEM, or CTE

 2904 + - Technology refresh/replacement plans that include instructional software

 2905 + - Board-approved spending for CS/STEM/CTE programs or professional development

 2906 + - Districts announcing they are evaluating or selecting CS/STEM curriculum vendors

 2907 +

 2908 + EXCLUDE:

 2909 + - General budget news without CS/STEM/CTE specifics

 2910 + - Construction/facilities budgets (even if "STEM building" )

 2911 + - Device-only purchases (laptops, Chromebooks, hardware)

 2912 + - ERP/payroll/admin system purchases

 2913 + - Assessment platform purchases

 2914 + - LMS/SIS purchases

 2915 + - Budget cuts or layoffs (unless reallocating TO CS/STEM)

 2916 +

 2917 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2918 + {{

 2919 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2920 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2921 + "budget_signal" : "budget_approved | curriculum_adoption | tech_plan | procurement | vendor_evaluation" ,

 2922 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2923 + "timeline" : "FY2026 | Spring 2026 | Fall 2026 | unknown" ,

 2924 + "what_theyre_buying" : "1 sentence: what CS/STEM/CTE they are buying or planning to buy" ,

 2925 + "headline" : "[district]: [budget signal summary]"

 2926 + }}

 2927 +

 2928 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2929 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2930 +

 2931 + Search results:

 2932 + {combined_text} """

 2933 +

 2934 + response = client.messages.create(

 2935 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2936 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2937 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2938 + )

 2939 + _track_usage(response)

 2940 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2941 + except Exception as e:

 2942 + logger.error( f"Claude budget extraction failed: {e} " )

 2943 + return []

 2944 +

 2945 + # Parse JSON

 2946 + try :

 2947 + clean = raw_text

 2948 + if "```" in clean:

 2949 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2950 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2951 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2952 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2953 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2954 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2955 + logger.warning( "Budget scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2956 + return []

 2957 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2958 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2959 + logger.warning( f"Budget scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2960 + return []

 2961 +

 2962 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2963 + signals = []

 2964 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2965 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2966 +

 2967 + for item in items:

 2968 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2969 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2970 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2971 + continue

 2972 +

 2973 + # NCES validation

 2974 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2975 + if nces_state:

 2976 + state = nces_state

 2977 +

 2978 + # Dedup by district

 2979 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2980 + if norm_district in dedup_seen:

 2981 + continue

 2982 + dedup_seen.add(norm_district)

 2983 +

 2984 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2985 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2986 +

 2987 + # Budget signals use "technology" weight — districts actively spending

 2988 + heat = compute_heat_score( "technology" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2989 + # Boost for vendor evaluation (hottest signal — actively shopping)

 2990 + budget_signal = (item.get( "budget_signal" ) or "" ).strip().lower()

 2991 + if budget_signal in ( "vendor_evaluation" , "procurement" ):

 2992 + heat = min (heat + 10 , 100 )

 2993 +

 2994 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f" {district} : budget signal" ).strip()

 2995 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2996 + timeline = (item.get( "timeline" ) or "" ).strip()

 2997 + if timeline and timeline != "unknown" :

 2998 + headline = f" {headline} ( {timeline} )"

 2999 +

 3000 + msg_id = f"budget_ {norm_district} _ {year_month} "

 3001 +

 3002 + signals.append({

 3003 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 3004 + "source" : "budget_scan" ,

 3005 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {budget_signal or 'budget' } " ,

 3006 + "signal_type" : "technology" , # Closest existing type for budget/procurement

 3007 + "scope" : "district" ,

 3008 + "district" : district,

 3011 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 3012 + "tier" : 1 ,

 3014 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 3015 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 3016 + "url" : "" ,

 3018 + })

 3019 +

 3022 + if progress_callback:

 3023 + progress_callback( f"Budget scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 3024 + return signals

 2627 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2628 + # GRANT-FUNDED PROSPECTING SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 2629 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2630 +

 2631 + def scan_grant_opportunities ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2632 + """

 2633 + Scan for K- 12 districts that received or are applying for CS/STEM/CTE grants.

 2634 + Targets: Title IV-A, Perkins V (CTE), state STEM grants, NSF awards, private foundation grants.

 2635 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2636 + """

 2637 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2638 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan grants" )

 2639 + return []

 2640 +

 2641 + import httpx

 2642 +

 2643 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2644 + _load_cross_references()

 2645 +

 2646 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2647 + all_snippets = []

 2648 + seen_urls = set ()

 2649 +

 2650 + if progress_callback:

 2651 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for STEM/CS grant awards..." )

 2652 +

 2653 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2654 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2655 + queries = [

 2656 + f'"grant" ("awarded" OR "received" OR "funded") ("computer science" OR "STEM" OR "CTE") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 2657 + f'("Title IV" OR "Perkins" OR "STEM grant" OR "CTE grant") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 2658 + ]

 2659 + for query in queries:

 2660 + try :

 2661 + resp = httpx.post(

 2662 + SERPER_URL,

 2663 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 2664 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2665 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2666 + )

 2667 + data = resp.json()

 2668 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2669 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2670 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2671 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2672 + all_snippets.append({

 2673 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2674 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2675 + "url" : url,

 2676 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2677 + })

 2678 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2679 + except Exception as e:

 2680 + logger.warning( f"Serper grant scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2681 +

 2682 + if not all_snippets:

 2683 + logger.info( "Grant scan: no results found" )

 2684 + if progress_callback:

 2685 + progress_callback( "Grant scan: no results found." )

 2686 + return []

 2687 +

 2688 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2689 +

 2690 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2691 + combined_text = ""

 2692 + for s in all_snippets:

 2693 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2694 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2695 +

 2696 + if progress_callback:

 2697 + progress_callback( f"Extracting grant signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2698 +

 2699 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2700 + import anthropic

 2701 + try :

 2702 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2703 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district grant awards and funding relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum from these search results.

 2704 +

 2705 + INCLUDE only:

 2706 + - Districts receiving grants for computer science, coding, STEM, CTE, or technology curriculum

 2707 + - Title IV-A well-rounded education grants used for CS/STEM

 2708 + - Perkins V CTE grants for CS/tech pathways

 2709 + - State STEM/CS education grants

 2710 + - NSF or private foundation grants for K- 12 CS/STEM programs

 2711 + - Districts announcing they will USE grant funds for CS/STEM/CTE

 2712 +

 2713 + EXCLUDE:

 2714 + - Construction/facilities grants (even if labeled "STEM building" )

 2715 + - Device/hardware-only grants ( 1 : 1 laptop, Chromebook)

 2716 + - Generic education grants not specific to CS/STEM/CTE

 2717 + - Grants to colleges or universities

 2718 + - Grants for non-education entities

 2719 + - E-Rate (telecom/internet infrastructure)

 2720 +

 2721 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2722 + {{

 2723 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2724 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2725 + "grant_type" : "Title IV-A | Perkins V | state_stem | nsf | private_foundation | other" ,

 2726 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2727 + "what_its_for" : "1 sentence: what the grant funds" ,

 2728 + "headline" : "Grant: [district] receives [amount] for [purpose]"

 2729 + }}

 2730 +

 2731 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2732 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2733 +

 2734 + Search results:

 2735 + {combined_text} """

 2736 +

 2737 + response = client.messages.create(

 2738 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2739 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2740 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2741 + )

 2742 + _track_usage(response)

 2743 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2744 + except Exception as e:

 2745 + logger.error( f"Claude grant extraction failed: {e} " )

 2746 + return []

 2747 +

 2748 + # Parse JSON

 2749 + try :

 2750 + clean = raw_text

 2751 + if "```" in clean:

 2752 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2753 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2754 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2755 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2756 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2757 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2758 + logger.warning( "Grant scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2759 + return []

 2760 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2761 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2762 + logger.warning( f"Grant scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2763 + return []

 2764 +

 2765 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2766 + signals = []

 2767 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2768 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2769 +

 2770 + for item in items:

 2771 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2772 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2773 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2774 + continue

 2775 +

 2776 + # NCES validation

 2777 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2778 + if nces_state:

 2779 + state = nces_state

 2780 +

 2781 + # Dedup by district + grant type

 2782 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2783 + grant_type = (item.get( "grant_type" ) or "other" ).strip().lower()

 2784 + dedup_key = (norm_district, grant_type)

 2785 + if dedup_key in dedup_seen:

 2786 + continue

 2787 + dedup_seen.add(dedup_key)

 2788 +

 2789 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2790 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2791 + heat = compute_heat_score( "grant" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2792 +

 2793 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f"Grant: {district} ( {state} )" ).strip()

 2794 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2795 + msg_id = f"grant_ {norm_district} _ {grant_type} _ {year_month} "

 2796 +

 2797 + signals.append({

 2798 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 2799 + "source" : "grant_scan" ,

 2800 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {grant_type} " ,

 2801 + "signal_type" : "grant" ,

 2802 + "scope" : "district" ,

 2803 + "district" : district,

 2804 + "state" : state,

 2805 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 2806 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 2807 + "tier" : 1 ,

 2808 + "heat_score" : heat,

 2809 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 2810 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 2811 + "url" : "" ,

 2812 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 2813 + })

 2814 +

 2815 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} CS/STEM grant signals extracted "

 2816 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 2817 + if progress_callback:

 2818 + progress_callback( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 2819 + return signals

 2820 +

 2821 +

 2822 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2823 + # BUDGET CYCLE TARGETING SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 2824 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2825 +

 2826 + def scan_budget_cycle_signals ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2827 + """

 2828 + Scan for K- 12 districts in active budget/procurement cycles for CS/STEM/CTE.

 2829 + Targets: budget approvals, curriculum adoption cycles, technology refresh plans,

 2830 + board-approved spending for CS/STEM programs.

 2831 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2832 + """

 2833 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2834 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan budget cycles" )

 2835 + return []

 2836 +

 2837 + import httpx

 2838 +

 2839 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2840 + _load_cross_references()

 2841 +

 2842 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2843 + all_snippets = []

 2844 + seen_urls = set ()

 2845 +

 2846 + if progress_callback:

 2847 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for budget/procurement signals..." )

 2848 +

 2849 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2850 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2851 + queries = [

 2852 + f'"budget" ("approved" OR "adopted" OR "proposed") ("computer science" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "technology") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 2853 + f'("curriculum adoption" OR "technology plan" OR "procurement" OR "technology refresh") ("CS" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "coding") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 2854 + ]

 2855 + for query in queries:

 2856 + try :

 2857 + resp = httpx.post(

 2858 + SERPER_URL,

 2859 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 2860 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2861 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2862 + )

 2863 + data = resp.json()

 2864 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2865 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2866 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2867 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2868 + all_snippets.append({

 2869 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2870 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2871 + "url" : url,

 2872 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2873 + })

 2874 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2875 + except Exception as e:

 2876 + logger.warning( f"Serper budget scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2877 +

 2878 + if not all_snippets:

 2879 + logger.info( "Budget scan: no results found" )

 2880 + if progress_callback:

 2881 + progress_callback( "Budget scan: no results found." )

 2882 + return []

 2883 +

 2884 + logger.info( f"Budget scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2885 +

 2886 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2887 + combined_text = ""

 2888 + for s in all_snippets:

 2889 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2890 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2891 +

 2892 + if progress_callback:

 2893 + progress_callback( f"Extracting budget signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2894 +

 2895 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2896 + import anthropic

 2897 + try :

 2898 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2899 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district budget and procurement signals relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum purchasing from these search results.

 2900 +

 2901 + INCLUDE only:

 2902 + - Districts approving budgets that include CS/STEM/CTE curriculum spending

 2903 + - Districts in curriculum adoption cycles for computer science, STEM, or CTE

 2904 + - Technology refresh/replacement plans that include instructional software

 2905 + - Board-approved spending for CS/STEM/CTE programs or professional development

 2906 + - Districts announcing they are evaluating or selecting CS/STEM curriculum vendors

 2907 +

 2908 + EXCLUDE:

 2909 + - General budget news without CS/STEM/CTE specifics

 2910 + - Construction/facilities budgets (even if "STEM building" )

 2911 + - Device-only purchases (laptops, Chromebooks, hardware)

 2912 + - ERP/payroll/admin system purchases

 2913 + - Assessment platform purchases

 2914 + - LMS/SIS purchases

 2915 + - Budget cuts or layoffs (unless reallocating TO CS/STEM)

 2916 +

 2917 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2918 + {{

 2919 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2920 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2921 + "budget_signal" : "budget_approved | curriculum_adoption | tech_plan | procurement | vendor_evaluation" ,

 2922 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2923 + "timeline" : "FY2026 | Spring 2026 | Fall 2026 | unknown" ,

 2924 + "what_theyre_buying" : "1 sentence: what CS/STEM/CTE they are buying or planning to buy" ,

 2925 + "headline" : "[district]: [budget signal summary]"

 2926 + }}

 2927 +

 2928 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2929 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2930 +

 2931 + Search results:

 2932 + {combined_text} """

 2933 +

 2934 + response = client.messages.create(

 2935 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2936 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2937 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2938 + )

 2939 + _track_usage(response)

 2940 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2941 + except Exception as e:

 2942 + logger.error( f"Claude budget extraction failed: {e} " )

 2943 + return []

 2944 +

 2945 + # Parse JSON

 2946 + try :

 2947 + clean = raw_text

 2948 + if "```" in clean:

 2949 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2950 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2951 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2952 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2953 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2954 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2955 + logger.warning( "Budget scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2956 + return []

 2957 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2958 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2959 + logger.warning( f"Budget scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2960 + return []

 2961 +

 2962 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2963 + signals = []

 2964 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2965 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2966 +

 2967 + for item in items:

 2968 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2969 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2970 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2971 + continue

 2972 +

 2973 + # NCES validation

 2974 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2975 + if nces_state:

 2976 + state = nces_state

 2977 +

 2978 + # Dedup by district

 2979 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2980 + if norm_district in dedup_seen:

 2981 + continue

 2982 + dedup_seen.add(norm_district)

 2983 +

 2984 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2985 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2986 +

 2987 + # Budget signals use "technology" weight — districts actively spending

 2988 + heat = compute_heat_score( "technology" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2989 + # Boost for vendor evaluation (hottest signal — actively shopping)

 2990 + budget_signal = (item.get( "budget_signal" ) or "" ).strip().lower()

 2991 + if budget_signal in ( "vendor_evaluation" , "procurement" ):

 2992 + heat = min (heat + 10 , 100 )

 2993 +

 2994 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f" {district} : budget signal" ).strip()

 2995 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2996 + timeline = (item.get( "timeline" ) or "" ).strip()

 2997 + if timeline and timeline != "unknown" :

 2998 + headline = f" {headline} ( {timeline} )"

 2999 +

 3000 + msg_id = f"budget_ {norm_district} _ {year_month} "

 3001 +

 3002 + signals.append({

 3003 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 3004 + "source" : "budget_scan" ,

 3005 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {budget_signal or 'budget' } " ,

 3006 + "signal_type" : "technology" , # Closest existing type for budget/procurement

 3007 + "scope" : "district" ,

 3008 + "district" : district,

 3009 + "state" : state,

 3010 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 3011 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 3012 + "tier" : 1 ,

 3013 + "heat_score" : heat,

 3014 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 3015 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 3016 + "url" : "" ,

 3017 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 3018 + })

 3019 +

 3020 + logger.info( f"Budget scan: { len (signals)} CS/STEM budget signals extracted "

 3021 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 3022 + if progress_callback:

 3023 + progress_callback( f"Budget scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 3024 + return signals

 3025 +

 3026 +

 3027 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 3028 # RSS FEED INGESTION

 3029 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2627 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2628 + # GRANT-FUNDED PROSPECTING SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 2629 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2630 +

 2631 + def scan_grant_opportunities ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2632 + """

 2633 + Scan for K- 12 districts that received or are applying for CS/STEM/CTE grants.

 2634 + Targets: Title IV-A, Perkins V (CTE), state STEM grants, NSF awards, private foundation grants.

 2635 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2636 + """

 2637 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2638 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan grants" )

 2639 + return []

 2640 +

 2641 + import httpx

 2642 +

 2643 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2644 + _load_cross_references()

 2645 +

 2646 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2647 + all_snippets = []

 2648 + seen_urls = set ()

 2649 +

 2650 + if progress_callback:

 2651 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for STEM/CS grant awards..." )

 2652 +

 2653 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2654 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2655 + queries = [

 2656 + f'"grant" ("awarded" OR "received" OR "funded") ("computer science" OR "STEM" OR "CTE") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 2657 + f'("Title IV" OR "Perkins" OR "STEM grant" OR "CTE grant") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 2658 + ]

 2659 + for query in queries:

 2660 + try :

 2661 + resp = httpx.post(

 2662 + SERPER_URL,

 2663 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 2664 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2665 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2666 + )

 2667 + data = resp.json()

 2668 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2669 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2670 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2671 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2672 + all_snippets.append({

 2673 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2674 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2675 + "url" : url,

 2676 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2677 + })

 2678 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2679 + except Exception as e:

 2680 + logger.warning( f"Serper grant scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2681 +

 2682 + if not all_snippets:

 2683 + logger.info( "Grant scan: no results found" )

 2684 + if progress_callback:

 2685 + progress_callback( "Grant scan: no results found." )

 2686 + return []

 2687 +

 2688 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2689 +

 2690 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2691 + combined_text = ""

 2692 + for s in all_snippets:

 2693 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2694 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2695 +

 2696 + if progress_callback:

 2697 + progress_callback( f"Extracting grant signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2698 +

 2699 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2700 + import anthropic

 2701 + try :

 2702 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2703 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district grant awards and funding relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum from these search results.

 2704 +

 2705 + INCLUDE only:

 2706 + - Districts receiving grants for computer science, coding, STEM, CTE, or technology curriculum

 2707 + - Title IV-A well-rounded education grants used for CS/STEM

 2708 + - Perkins V CTE grants for CS/tech pathways

 2709 + - State STEM/CS education grants

 2710 + - NSF or private foundation grants for K- 12 CS/STEM programs

 2711 + - Districts announcing they will USE grant funds for CS/STEM/CTE

 2712 +

 2713 + EXCLUDE:

 2714 + - Construction/facilities grants (even if labeled "STEM building" )

 2715 + - Device/hardware-only grants ( 1 : 1 laptop, Chromebook)

 2716 + - Generic education grants not specific to CS/STEM/CTE

 2717 + - Grants to colleges or universities

 2718 + - Grants for non-education entities

 2719 + - E-Rate (telecom/internet infrastructure)

 2720 +

 2721 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2722 + {{

 2723 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2724 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2725 + "grant_type" : "Title IV-A | Perkins V | state_stem | nsf | private_foundation | other" ,

 2726 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2727 + "what_its_for" : "1 sentence: what the grant funds" ,

 2728 + "headline" : "Grant: [district] receives [amount] for [purpose]"

 2729 + }}

 2730 +

 2731 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2732 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2733 +

 2734 + Search results:

 2735 + {combined_text} """

 2736 +

 2737 + response = client.messages.create(

 2738 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2739 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2740 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2741 + )

 2742 + _track_usage(response)

 2743 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2744 + except Exception as e:

 2745 + logger.error( f"Claude grant extraction failed: {e} " )

 2746 + return []

 2747 +

 2748 + # Parse JSON

 2749 + try :

 2750 + clean = raw_text

 2751 + if "```" in clean:

 2752 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2753 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2754 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2755 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2756 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2757 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2758 + logger.warning( "Grant scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2759 + return []

 2760 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2761 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2762 + logger.warning( f"Grant scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2763 + return []

 2764 +

 2765 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2766 + signals = []

 2767 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2768 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2769 +

 2770 + for item in items:

 2771 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2772 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2773 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2774 + continue

 2775 +

 2776 + # NCES validation

 2777 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2778 + if nces_state:

 2779 + state = nces_state

 2780 +

 2781 + # Dedup by district + grant type

 2782 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2783 + grant_type = (item.get( "grant_type" ) or "other" ).strip().lower()

 2784 + dedup_key = (norm_district, grant_type)

 2785 + if dedup_key in dedup_seen:

 2786 + continue

 2787 + dedup_seen.add(dedup_key)

 2788 +

 2789 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2790 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2791 + heat = compute_heat_score( "grant" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2792 +

 2793 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f"Grant: {district} ( {state} )" ).strip()

 2794 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2795 + msg_id = f"grant_ {norm_district} _ {grant_type} _ {year_month} "

 2796 +

 2797 + signals.append({

 2798 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 2799 + "source" : "grant_scan" ,

 2800 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {grant_type} " ,

 2801 + "signal_type" : "grant" ,

 2802 + "scope" : "district" ,

 2803 + "district" : district,

 2804 + "state" : state,

 2805 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 2806 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 2807 + "tier" : 1 ,

 2808 + "heat_score" : heat,

 2809 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 2810 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 2811 + "url" : "" ,

 2812 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 2813 + })

 2814 +

 2815 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} CS/STEM grant signals extracted "

 2816 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 2817 + if progress_callback:

 2818 + progress_callback( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 2819 + return signals

 2820 +

 2821 +
