 2678 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2679 + except Exception as e:

 2680 + logger.warning( f"Serper grant scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2681 +

 2682 + if not all_snippets:

 2683 + logger.info( "Grant scan: no results found" )

 2684 + if progress_callback:

 2685 + progress_callback( "Grant scan: no results found." )

 2686 + return []

 2687 +

 2688 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2689 +

 2690 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2691 + combined_text = ""

 2692 + for s in all_snippets:

 2693 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2694 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2695 +

 2696 + if progress_callback:

 2697 + progress_callback( f"Extracting grant signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2698 +

 2699 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2700 + import anthropic

 2701 + try :

 2702 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2703 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district grant awards and funding relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum from these search results.

 2704 +

 2705 + INCLUDE only:

 2706 + - Districts receiving grants for computer science, coding, STEM, CTE, or technology curriculum

 2707 + - Title IV-A well-rounded education grants used for CS/STEM

 2708 + - Perkins V CTE grants for CS/tech pathways

 2709 + - State STEM/CS education grants

 2710 + - NSF or private foundation grants for K- 12 CS/STEM programs

 2711 + - Districts announcing they will USE grant funds for CS/STEM/CTE

 2712 +

 2713 + EXCLUDE:

 2714 + - Construction/facilities grants (even if labeled "STEM building" )

 2715 + - Device/hardware-only grants ( 1 : 1 laptop, Chromebook)

 2716 + - Generic education grants not specific to CS/STEM/CTE

 2717 + - Grants to colleges or universities

 2718 + - Grants for non-education entities

 2719 + - E-Rate (telecom/internet infrastructure)

 2720 +

 2721 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2722 + {{

 2723 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2724 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2725 + "grant_type" : "Title IV-A | Perkins V | state_stem | nsf | private_foundation | other" ,

 2726 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2727 + "what_its_for" : "1 sentence: what the grant funds" ,

 2728 + "headline" : "Grant: [district] receives [amount] for [purpose]"

 2729 + }}

 2730 +

 2731 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2732 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2733 +

 2734 + Search results:

 2735 + {combined_text} """

 2736 +

 2737 + response = client.messages.create(

 2738 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2739 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2740 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2741 + )

 2742 + _track_usage(response)

 2743 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2744 + except Exception as e:

 2745 + logger.error( f"Claude grant extraction failed: {e} " )

 2746 + return []

 2747 +

 2748 + # Parse JSON

 2749 + try :

 2750 + clean = raw_text

 2751 + if "```" in clean:

 2752 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2753 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2754 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2755 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2756 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2757 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2758 + logger.warning( "Grant scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2759 + return []

 2760 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2761 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2762 + logger.warning( f"Grant scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2763 + return []

 2764 +

 2765 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2766 + signals = []

 2767 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2768 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2769 +

 2770 + for item in items:

 2771 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2772 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2773 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2774 + continue

 2775 +

 2776 + # NCES validation

 2777 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2778 + if nces_state:

 2779 + state = nces_state

 2780 +

 2781 + # Dedup by district + grant type

 2782 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2783 + grant_type = (item.get( "grant_type" ) or "other" ).strip().lower()

 2784 + dedup_key = (norm_district, grant_type)

 2785 + if dedup_key in dedup_seen:

 2786 + continue

 2787 + dedup_seen.add(dedup_key)

 2788 +

 2789 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2790 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2791 + heat = compute_heat_score( "grant" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2792 +

 2793 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f"Grant: {district} ( {state} )" ).strip()

 2794 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2795 + msg_id = f"grant_ {norm_district} _ {grant_type} _ {year_month} "

 2796 +

 2797 + signals.append({

 2798 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 2799 + "source" : "grant_scan" ,

 2800 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {grant_type} " ,

 2801 + "signal_type" : "grant" ,

 2802 + "scope" : "district" ,

 2803 + "district" : district,

 2804 + "state" : state,

 2805 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 2806 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 2807 + "tier" : 1 ,

 2808 + "heat_score" : heat,

 2809 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 2810 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 2811 + "url" : "" ,

 2812 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 2813 + })

 2814 +

 2815 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} CS/STEM grant signals extracted "

 2816 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 2817 + if progress_callback:

 2818 + progress_callback( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 2819 + return signals

 2820 +

 2821 +

 2822 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2823 + # BUDGET CYCLE TARGETING SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 2824 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2825 +

 2826 + def scan_budget_cycle_signals ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2827 + """

 2828 + Scan for K- 12 districts in active budget/procurement cycles for CS/STEM/CTE.

 2829 + Targets: budget approvals, curriculum adoption cycles, technology refresh plans,

 2830 + board-approved spending for CS/STEM programs.

 2831 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2832 + """

 2833 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2834 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan budget cycles" )

 2835 + return []

 2836 +

 2837 + import httpx

 2838 +

 2839 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2840 + _load_cross_references()

 2841 +

 2842 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2843 + all_snippets = []

 2844 + seen_urls = set ()

 2845 +

 2846 + if progress_callback:

 2847 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for budget/procurement signals..." )

 2848 +

 2849 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2850 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2851 + queries = [

 2852 + f'"budget" ("approved" OR "adopted" OR "proposed") ("computer science" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "technology") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 2853 + f'("curriculum adoption" OR "technology plan" OR "procurement" OR "technology refresh") ("CS" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "coding") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 2854 + ]

 2855 + for query in queries:

 2856 + try :

 2857 + resp = httpx.post(

 2858 + SERPER_URL,

 2859 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 2860 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2861 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2862 + )

 2863 + data = resp.json()

 2864 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2865 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2866 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2867 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2868 + all_snippets.append({

 2869 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2870 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2871 + "url" : url,

 2872 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2873 + })

 2874 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2875 + except Exception as e:

 2876 + logger.warning( f"Serper budget scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2877 +

 2878 + if not all_snippets:

 2879 + logger.info( "Budget scan: no results found" )

 2880 + if progress_callback:

 2881 + progress_callback( "Budget scan: no results found." )

 2882 + return []

 2883 +

 2884 + logger.info( f"Budget scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2885 +

 2886 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2887 + combined_text = ""

 2888 + for s in all_snippets:

 2889 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2890 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2891 +

 2892 + if progress_callback:

 2893 + progress_callback( f"Extracting budget signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2894 +

 2895 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2896 + import anthropic

 2897 + try :

 2898 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2899 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district budget and procurement signals relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum purchasing from these search results.

 2900 +

 2901 + INCLUDE only:

 2902 + - Districts approving budgets that include CS/STEM/CTE curriculum spending

 2903 + - Districts in curriculum adoption cycles for computer science, STEM, or CTE

 2904 + - Technology refresh/replacement plans that include instructional software

 2905 + - Board-approved spending for CS/STEM/CTE programs or professional development

 2906 + - Districts announcing they are evaluating or selecting CS/STEM curriculum vendors

 2907 +

 2908 + EXCLUDE:

 2909 + - General budget news without CS/STEM/CTE specifics

 2910 + - Construction/facilities budgets (even if "STEM building" )

 2911 + - Device-only purchases (laptops, Chromebooks, hardware)

 2912 + - ERP/payroll/admin system purchases

 2913 + - Assessment platform purchases

 2914 + - LMS/SIS purchases

 2915 + - Budget cuts or layoffs (unless reallocating TO CS/STEM)

 2916 +

 2917 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2918 + {{

 2919 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2920 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2921 + "budget_signal" : "budget_approved | curriculum_adoption | tech_plan | procurement | vendor_evaluation" ,

 2922 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2923 + "timeline" : "FY2026 | Spring 2026 | Fall 2026 | unknown" ,

 2924 + "what_theyre_buying" : "1 sentence: what CS/STEM/CTE they are buying or planning to buy" ,

 2925 + "headline" : "[district]: [budget signal summary]"

 2926 + }}

 2927 +

 2928 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2929 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2930 +

 2931 + Search results:

 2932 + {combined_text} """

 2933 +

 2934 + response = client.messages.create(

 2935 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2936 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2937 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2938 + )

 2939 + _track_usage(response)

 2940 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2941 + except Exception as e:

 2942 + logger.error( f"Claude budget extraction failed: {e} " )

 2943 + return []

 2944 +

 2945 + # Parse JSON

 2946 + try :

 2947 + clean = raw_text

 2948 + if "```" in clean:

 2949 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2950 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2951 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2952 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2953 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2954 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2955 + logger.warning( "Budget scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2956 + return []

 2957 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2958 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2959 + logger.warning( f"Budget scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2960 + return []

 2961 +

 2962 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2963 + signals = []

 2964 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2965 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2966 +

 2967 + for item in items:

 2968 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2969 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2970 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2971 + continue

 2972 +

 2973 + # NCES validation

 2974 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2975 + if nces_state:

 2976 + state = nces_state

 2977 +

 2978 + # Dedup by district

 2979 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2980 + if norm_district in dedup_seen:

 2981 + continue

 2982 + dedup_seen.add(norm_district)

 2983 +

 2984 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2985 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2986 +

 2987 + # Budget signals use "technology" weight — districts actively spending

 2988 + heat = compute_heat_score( "technology" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2989 + # Boost for vendor evaluation (hottest signal — actively shopping)

 2990 + budget_signal = (item.get( "budget_signal" ) or "" ).strip().lower()

 2991 + if budget_signal in ( "vendor_evaluation" , "procurement" ):

 2992 + heat = min (heat + 10 , 100 )

 2993 +

 2994 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f" {district} : budget signal" ).strip()

 2995 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2996 + timeline = (item.get( "timeline" ) or "" ).strip()

 2997 + if timeline and timeline != "unknown" :

 2998 + headline = f" {headline} ( {timeline} )"

 2999 +

 3000 + msg_id = f"budget_ {norm_district} _ {year_month} "

 3001 +

 3002 + signals.append({

 3003 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 3004 + "source" : "budget_scan" ,

 3005 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {budget_signal or 'budget' } " ,

 3006 + "signal_type" : "technology" , # Closest existing type for budget/procurement

 3007 + "scope" : "district" ,

 3008 + "district" : district,

 3009 + "state" : state,

 3010 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 3011 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 3012 + "tier" : 1 ,

 3013 + "heat_score" : heat,

 3014 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 3015 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 3016 + "url" : "" ,

 3017 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 3018 + })

 3019 +

 3020 + logger.info( f"Budget scan: { len (signals)} CS/STEM budget signals extracted "

 3021 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 3022 + if progress_callback:

 3023 + progress_callback( f"Budget scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 3024 + return signals

 3025 +

 3027 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 3028 + # AI ALGEBRA CAMPAIGN SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 3029 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 3030 +

 3031 + def scan_algebra_targets ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 3032 + """

 3033 + Scan for K- 12 districts actively seeking math/algebra technology or curriculum.

 3034 + Targets for the AI Algebra product (launched via AI Hackstack).

 3035 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 3036 + """

 3037 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 3038 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan algebra targets" )

 3039 + return []

 3040 +

 3041 + import httpx

 3042 +

 3043 + _load_nces_lookup()

 3044 + _load_cross_references()

 3045 +

 3046 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 3047 + all_snippets = []

 3048 + seen_urls = set ()

 3049 +

 3050 + if progress_callback:

 3051 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for math/algebra curriculum signals..." )

 3052 +

 3053 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 3054 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 3055 + queries = [

 3056 + f'("math curriculum" OR "algebra curriculum") ("adoption" OR "pilot" OR "evaluate" OR "implement") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 3057 + f'("math technology" OR "adaptive math" OR "game-based math" OR "math intervention") K-12 school district " {state_name} "' ,

 3058 + f'("algebra" OR "mathematics") ("RFP" OR "request for proposal" OR "technology pilot") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 3059 + ]

 3060 + for query in queries:

 3061 + try :

 3062 + resp = httpx.post(

 3063 + SERPER_URL,

 3064 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 3065 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 3066 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 3067 + )

 3068 + data = resp.json()

 3069 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 3070 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 3071 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 3072 + seen_urls.add(url)

 3073 + all_snippets.append({

 3074 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 3075 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 3076 + "url" : url,

 3077 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 3078 + })

 3079 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 3080 + except Exception as e:

 3081 + logger.warning( f"Serper algebra scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 3082 +

 3083 + if not all_snippets:

 3084 + logger.info( "Algebra scan: no results found" )

 3085 + if progress_callback:

 3086 + progress_callback( "Algebra scan: no results found." )

 3087 + return []

 3088 +

 3089 + logger.info( f"Algebra scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 3090 +

 3091 + combined_text = ""

 3092 + for s in all_snippets:

 3093 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 3094 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 3095 +

 3096 + if progress_callback:

 3097 + progress_callback( f"Extracting algebra campaign targets from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 3098 +

 3099 + import anthropic

 3100 + try :

 3101 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 3102 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school districts that are actively seeking, evaluating, or implementing math/algebra technology or curriculum from these search results.

 3103 +

 3104 + INCLUDE:

 3105 + - Districts adopting or piloting math/algebra technology platforms

 3106 + - Districts posting RFPs for math curriculum or technology

 3107 + - Districts implementing game-based or adaptive math programs

 3108 + - Districts with new math initiatives, algebra intervention programs

 3109 + - Districts expanding math technology to more grades/schools

 3110 + - Districts with math curriculum adoption cycles underway

 3111 +

 3112 + EXCLUDE:

 3113 + - General math education news without a specific district taking action

 3114 + - College/university programs

 3115 + - State-level policy without district-specific action

 3116 + - Assessment-only tools (state testing, benchmarking)

 3117 + - Districts just talking about math scores without taking procurement action

 3118 +

 3119 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 3120 + {{

 3121 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 3122 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 3123 + "action_type" : "adoption | pilot | rfp | expansion | initiative" ,

 3124 + "what_theyre_doing" : "1 sentence: what math/algebra action they are taking" ,

 3125 + "headline" : "[district] ([state]): [action summary]"

 3126 + }}

 3127 +

 3128 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 3129 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 3130 +

 3131 + Search results:

 3132 + {combined_text} """

 3133 +

 3134 + response = client.messages.create(

 3135 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 3136 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 3137 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 3138 + )

 3139 + _track_usage(response)

 3140 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 3141 + except Exception as e:

 3142 + logger.error( f"Claude algebra extraction failed: {e} " )

 3143 + return []

 3144 +

 3145 + try :

 3146 + clean = raw_text

 3147 + if "```" in clean:

 3148 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 3149 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 3150 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 3151 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 3152 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 3153 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 3154 + logger.warning( "Algebra scan: no JSON array in response" )

 3155 + return []

 3156 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 3157 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 3158 + logger.warning( f"Algebra scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 3159 + return []

 3160 +

 3161 + signals = []

 3162 + dedup_seen = set ()

 3163 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 3164 +

 3165 + for item in items:

 3166 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 3167 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 3168 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 3169 + continue

 3170 +

 3171 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 3172 + if nces_state:

 3173 + state = nces_state

 3174 +

 3175 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 3176 + if norm_district in dedup_seen:

 3177 + continue

 3178 + dedup_seen.add(norm_district)

 3179 +

 3180 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 3181 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 3182 + heat = compute_heat_score( "curriculum" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 3183 + # Boost: districts actively buying math curriculum are hot targets for AI Algebra

 3184 + action_type = (item.get( "action_type" ) or "" ).strip().lower()

 3185 + if action_type in ( "rfp" , "pilot" , "adoption" ):

 3186 + heat = min (heat + 15 , 100 )

 3187 +

 3188 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f" {district} : math/algebra signal" ).strip()

 3189 + msg_id = f"algebra_ {norm_district} _ {year_month} "

 3190 +

 3191 + signals.append({

 3192 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 3193 + "source" : "algebra_scan" ,

 3194 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {action_type or 'math' } " ,

 3195 + "signal_type" : "curriculum" ,

 3196 + "scope" : "district" ,

 3197 + "district" : district,

 3198 + "state" : state,

 3199 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 3200 + "dollar_amount" : "" ,

 3201 + "tier" : 1 ,

 3202 + "heat_score" : heat,

 3203 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 3204 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 3205 + "url" : "" ,

 3206 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 3207 + })

 3208 +

 3209 + logger.info( f"Algebra scan: { len (signals)} math/algebra campaign targets extracted "

 3210 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 3211 + if progress_callback:

 3212 + progress_callback( f"Algebra scan: { len (signals)} targets found" )

 3213 + return signals

 ⎿   Added 1 line, removed 1 line
 202 **ESA_PATTERNS in target_roles.py has 78 entity name variations.** From Steven's ROLES and KEYWORDS doc. Covers ESC, BOCES, IU, COE, ROE, ISC, ESU, AEA, CESA, SELPA, JPA, SSA, and dozens more.
 204 - **`signal_processor.py` is a flat module imported at top of main.py.** 10 signal sources: Google Alerts (regex), Burbio (Claude), DOE (Claude), RSS (feedparser), BoardDocs (HTTP scraping), Ball
 - otpedia (HTTP scraping), Job postings (JobSpy), Leadership scan (Serper + Claude), RFP scan (Serper + Claude), Legislative scan (Serper + Claude). Signals Database tab (18 columns including Pip
 - eline Link). 16 Telegram commands, all direct-dispatch. Daily scan at 7:45 AM CST. Weekly Monday: leadership 8 AM + RFP 8:15 AM. Monthly 1st Monday: legislation 8:30 AM. All ~$0.03/scan each. B
 - oardDocs/Ballotpedia/RSS wrapped in try/except (non-fatal). `_last_signal_batch` is in-memory — run `/signals` before `/signal_act` or `/signal_info` in a new session.

 204 + **`signal_processor.py` is a flat module imported at top of main.py.** 14 signal sources: Google Alerts (regex), Burbio (Claude), DOE (Claude), RSS (feedparser), BoardDocs (HTTP scraping), Ball

 + otpedia (HTTP scraping), Job postings (JobSpy), Leadership scan (Serper + Claude), RFP scan (Serper + Claude), Legislative scan (Serper + Claude) , Grant scan (Serper + Claude), Budget scan (Ser

 + per + Claude), Algebra scan (Serper + Claude), Cybersecurity scan (Serper + Claude) . Signals Database tab (18 columns including Pipeline Link). 22 Telegram commands, all direct-dispatch. Daily

 + scan at 7:45 AM CST. Weekly Monday: leadership 8 AM + RFP 8:15 AM. Monthly 1st Monday: legislation 8:30 AM + grants 8:45 AM + budget 9:00 AM . Algebra/cybersecurity scans are on-demand only (`/s

 + ignal_algebra`, `/signal_cyber`). All ~$0.03/scan each. BoardDocs/Ballotpedia/RSS wrapped in try/except (non-fatal). `_last_signal_batch` is in-memory — run `/signals` before `/signal_act` or `

 + /signal_info` in a new session.

 206 **Signal enrichment must run before acting on signals.** Never queue a district based on a headline alone. `enrich_signal()` does Serper web search + Claude Haiku analysis for CodeCombat releva

 nce (strong/moderate/weak/none). A $6.2B bond can be WEAK if it's all devices. A no-dollar STEAM coordinator hire can be STRONG. Auto-runs on Tier 1 during daily scans; manual via `/signal_enri

 ch N`.

 2627 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2628 + # GRANT-FUNDED PROSPECTING SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 2629 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2630 +

 2631 + def scan_grant_opportunities ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2632 + """

 2633 + Scan for K- 12 districts that received or are applying for CS/STEM/CTE grants.

 2634 + Targets: Title IV-A, Perkins V (CTE), state STEM grants, NSF awards, private foundation grants.

 2635 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2636 + """

 2637 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2638 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan grants" )

 2639 + return []

 2640 +

 2641 + import httpx

 2642 +

 2643 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2644 + _load_cross_references()

 2645 +

 2646 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2647 + all_snippets = []

 2648 + seen_urls = set ()

 2649 +

 2650 + if progress_callback:

 2651 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for STEM/CS grant awards..." )

 2652 +

 2653 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2654 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2655 + queries = [

 2656 + f'"grant" ("awarded" OR "received" OR "funded") ("computer science" OR "STEM" OR "CTE") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 2657 + f'("Title IV" OR "Perkins" OR "STEM grant" OR "CTE grant") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 2658 + ]

 2659 + for query in queries:

 2660 + try :

 2661 + resp = httpx.post(

 2662 + SERPER_URL,

 2663 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 2664 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2665 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2666 + )

 2667 + data = resp.json()

 2668 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2669 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2670 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2671 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2672 + all_snippets.append({

 2673 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2674 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2675 + "url" : url,

 2676 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2677 + })

 2678 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2679 + except Exception as e:

 2680 + logger.warning( f"Serper grant scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2681 +

 2682 + if not all_snippets:

 2683 + logger.info( "Grant scan: no results found" )

 2684 + if progress_callback:

 2685 + progress_callback( "Grant scan: no results found." )

 2686 + return []

 2687 +

 2688 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2689 +

 2690 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2691 + combined_text = ""

 2692 + for s in all_snippets:

 2693 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2694 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2695 +

 2696 + if progress_callback:

 2697 + progress_callback( f"Extracting grant signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2698 +

 2699 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2700 + import anthropic

 2701 + try :

 2702 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2703 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district grant awards and funding relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum from these search results.

 2704 +

 2705 + INCLUDE only:

 2706 + - Districts receiving grants for computer science, coding, STEM, CTE, or technology curriculum

 2707 + - Title IV-A well-rounded education grants used for CS/STEM

 2708 + - Perkins V CTE grants for CS/tech pathways

 2709 + - State STEM/CS education grants

 2710 + - NSF or private foundation grants for K- 12 CS/STEM programs

 2711 + - Districts announcing they will USE grant funds for CS/STEM/CTE

 2712 +

 2713 + EXCLUDE:

 2714 + - Construction/facilities grants (even if labeled "STEM building" )

 2715 + - Device/hardware-only grants ( 1 : 1 laptop, Chromebook)

 2716 + - Generic education grants not specific to CS/STEM/CTE

 2717 + - Grants to colleges or universities

 2718 + - Grants for non-education entities

 2719 + - E-Rate (telecom/internet infrastructure)

 2720 +

 2721 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2722 + {{

 2723 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2724 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2725 + "grant_type" : "Title IV-A | Perkins V | state_stem | nsf | private_foundation | other" ,

 2726 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2727 + "what_its_for" : "1 sentence: what the grant funds" ,

 2728 + "headline" : "Grant: [district] receives [amount] for [purpose]"

 2729 + }}

 2730 +

 2731 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2732 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2733 +

 2734 + Search results:

 2735 + {combined_text} """

 2736 +

 2737 + response = client.messages.create(

 2738 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2739 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2740 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2741 + )

 2742 + _track_usage(response)

 2743 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2744 + except Exception as e:

 2745 + logger.error( f"Claude grant extraction failed: {e} " )

 2746 + return []

 2747 +

 2748 + # Parse JSON

 2749 + try :

 2750 + clean = raw_text

 2751 + if "```" in clean:

 2752 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2753 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2754 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2755 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2756 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2757 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2758 + logger.warning( "Grant scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2759 + return []

 2760 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2761 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2762 + logger.warning( f"Grant scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2763 + return []

 2764 +

 2765 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2766 + signals = []

 2767 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2768 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2769 +

 2770 + for item in items:

 2771 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2772 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2773 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2774 + continue

 2775 +

 2776 + # NCES validation

 2777 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2778 + if nces_state:

 2779 + state = nces_state

 2780 +

 2781 + # Dedup by district + grant type

 2782 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 2783 + grant_type = (item.get( "grant_type" ) or "other" ).strip().lower()

 2784 + dedup_key = (norm_district, grant_type)

 2785 + if dedup_key in dedup_seen:

 2786 + continue

 2787 + dedup_seen.add(dedup_key)

 2788 +

 2789 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 2790 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 2791 + heat = compute_heat_score( "grant" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 2792 +

 2793 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f"Grant: {district} ( {state} )" ).strip()

 2794 + dollar = (item.get( "dollar_amount" ) or "" ).strip()

 2795 + msg_id = f"grant_ {norm_district} _ {grant_type} _ {year_month} "

 2796 +

 2797 + signals.append({

 2798 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 2799 + "source" : "grant_scan" ,

 2800 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {grant_type} " ,

 2801 + "signal_type" : "grant" ,

 2802 + "scope" : "district" ,

 2803 + "district" : district,

 2804 + "state" : state,

 2805 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 2806 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 2807 + "tier" : 1 ,

 2808 + "heat_score" : heat,

 2809 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 2810 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 2811 + "url" : "" ,

 2812 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 2813 + })

 2814 +

 2815 + logger.info( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} CS/STEM grant signals extracted "

 2816 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 2817 + if progress_callback:

 2818 + progress_callback( f"Grant scan: { len (signals)} signals found" )

 2819 + return signals

 2820 +

 2821 +

 2822 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2823 + # BUDGET CYCLE TARGETING SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 2824 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 2825 +

 2826 + def scan_budget_cycle_signals ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 2827 + """

 2828 + Scan for K- 12 districts in active budget/procurement cycles for CS/STEM/CTE.

 2829 + Targets: budget approvals, curriculum adoption cycles, technology refresh plans,

 2830 + board-approved spending for CS/STEM programs.

 2831 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 2832 + """

 2833 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 2834 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan budget cycles" )

 2835 + return []

 2836 +

 2837 + import httpx

 2838 +

 2839 + _load_nces_lookup()

 2840 + _load_cross_references()

 2841 +

 2842 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 2843 + all_snippets = []

 2844 + seen_urls = set ()

 2845 +

 2846 + if progress_callback:

 2847 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for budget/procurement signals..." )

 2848 +

 2849 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 2850 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 2851 + queries = [

 2852 + f'"budget" ("approved" OR "adopted" OR "proposed") ("computer science" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "technology") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 2853 + f'("curriculum adoption" OR "technology plan" OR "procurement" OR "technology refresh") ("CS" OR "STEM" OR "CTE" OR "coding") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 2854 + ]

 2855 + for query in queries:

 2856 + try :

 2857 + resp = httpx.post(

 2858 + SERPER_URL,

 2859 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 2860 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 2861 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 2862 + )

 2863 + data = resp.json()

 2864 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 2865 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 2866 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 2867 + seen_urls.add(url)

 2868 + all_snippets.append({

 2869 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 2870 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 2871 + "url" : url,

 2872 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 2873 + })

 2874 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 2875 + except Exception as e:

 2876 + logger.warning( f"Serper budget scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 2877 +

 2878 + if not all_snippets:

 2879 + logger.info( "Budget scan: no results found" )

 2880 + if progress_callback:

 2881 + progress_callback( "Budget scan: no results found." )

 2882 + return []

 2883 +

 2884 + logger.info( f"Budget scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 2885 +

 2886 + # Build combined text for Claude

 2887 + combined_text = ""

 2888 + for s in all_snippets:

 2889 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 2890 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 2891 +

 2892 + if progress_callback:

 2893 + progress_callback( f"Extracting budget signals from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 2894 +

 2895 + # Claude Haiku extraction

 2896 + import anthropic

 2897 + try :

 2898 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 2899 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school district budget and procurement signals relevant to CS/STEM/CTE curriculum purchasing from these search results.

 2900 +

 2901 + INCLUDE only:

 2902 + - Districts approving budgets that include CS/STEM/CTE curriculum spending

 2903 + - Districts in curriculum adoption cycles for computer science, STEM, or CTE

 2904 + - Technology refresh/replacement plans that include instructional software

 2905 + - Board-approved spending for CS/STEM/CTE programs or professional development

 2906 + - Districts announcing they are evaluating or selecting CS/STEM curriculum vendors

 2907 +

 2908 + EXCLUDE:

 2909 + - General budget news without CS/STEM/CTE specifics

 2910 + - Construction/facilities budgets (even if "STEM building" )

 2911 + - Device-only purchases (laptops, Chromebooks, hardware)

 2912 + - ERP/payroll/admin system purchases

 2913 + - Assessment platform purchases

 2914 + - LMS/SIS purchases

 2915 + - Budget cuts or layoffs (unless reallocating TO CS/STEM)

 2916 +

 2917 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 2918 + {{

 2919 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 2920 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 2921 + "budget_signal" : "budget_approved | curriculum_adoption | tech_plan | procurement | vendor_evaluation" ,

 2922 + "dollar_amount" : "$X,XXX or empty string if unknown" ,

 2923 + "timeline" : "FY2026 | Spring 2026 | Fall 2026 | unknown" ,

 2924 + "what_theyre_buying" : "1 sentence: what CS/STEM/CTE they are buying or planning to buy" ,

 2925 + "headline" : "[district]: [budget signal summary]"

 2926 + }}

 2927 +

 2928 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 2929 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 2930 +

 2931 + Search results:

 2932 + {combined_text} """

 2933 +

 2934 + response = client.messages.create(

 2935 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 2936 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 2937 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 2938 + )

 2939 + _track_usage(response)

 2940 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 2941 + except Exception as e:

 2942 + logger.error( f"Claude budget extraction failed: {e} " )

 2943 + return []

 2944 +

 2945 + # Parse JSON

 2946 + try :

 2947 + clean = raw_text

 2948 + if "```" in clean:

 2949 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 2950 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 2951 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 2952 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 2953 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 2954 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 2955 + logger.warning( "Budget scan: no JSON array in response" )

 2956 + return []

 2957 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 2958 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 2959 + logger.warning( f"Budget scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 2960 + return []

 2961 +

 2962 + # Post-process: validate, dedup, build signals

 2963 + signals = []

 2964 + dedup_seen = set ()

 2965 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 2966 +

 2967 + for item in items:

 2968 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 2969 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 2970 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 2971 + continue

 2972 +

 2973 + # NCES validation

 2974 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 2975 + if nces_state:

 2976 + state = nces_state

 3004 + "source" : "budget_scan" ,

 3006 + "signal_type" : "technology" , # Closest existing type for budget/procurement

 3007 + "scope" : "district" ,

 3008 + "district" : district,

 3009 + "state" : state,

 3010 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 3011 + "dollar_amount" : dollar,

 3012 + "tier" : 1 ,

 3013 + "heat_score" : heat,

 3014 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 3024 + return signals

 3028 + # AI ALGEBRA CAMPAIGN SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 3030 +

 3031 + def scan_algebra_targets ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 3032 + """

 3033 + Scan for K- 12 districts actively seeking math/algebra technology or curriculum.

 3034 + Targets for the AI Algebra product (launched via AI Hackstack).

 3035 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 3036 + """

 3037 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 3038 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan algebra targets" )

 3039 + return []

 3040 +

 3041 + import httpx

 3042 +

 3043 + _load_nces_lookup()

 3044 + _load_cross_references()

 3045 +

 3046 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 3047 + all_snippets = []

 3048 + seen_urls = set ()

 3049 +

 3050 + if progress_callback:

 3051 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for math/algebra curriculum signals..." )

 3052 +

 3053 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 3054 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 3055 + queries = [

 3056 + f'("math curriculum" OR "algebra curriculum") ("adoption" OR "pilot" OR "evaluate" OR "implement") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 3057 + f'("math technology" OR "adaptive math" OR "game-based math" OR "math intervention") K-12 school district " {state_name} "' ,

 3058 + f'("algebra" OR "mathematics") ("RFP" OR "request for proposal" OR "technology pilot") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 3059 + ]

 3060 + for query in queries:

 3061 + try :

 3062 + resp = httpx.post(

 3063 + SERPER_URL,

 3064 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 3065 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 3066 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 3067 + )

 3068 + data = resp.json()

 3069 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 3070 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 3071 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 3072 + seen_urls.add(url)

 3073 + all_snippets.append({

 3074 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 3075 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 3076 + "url" : url,

 3077 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 3078 + })

 3079 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 3080 + except Exception as e:

 3081 + logger.warning( f"Serper algebra scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 3082 +

 3083 + if not all_snippets:

 3084 + logger.info( "Algebra scan: no results found" )

 3085 + if progress_callback:

 3086 + progress_callback( "Algebra scan: no results found." )

 3087 + return []

 3088 +

 3089 + logger.info( f"Algebra scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 3090 +

 3091 + combined_text = ""

 3092 + for s in all_snippets:

 3093 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 3094 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 3095 +

 3096 + if progress_callback:

 3097 + progress_callback( f"Extracting algebra campaign targets from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 3098 +

 3099 + import anthropic

 3100 + try :

 3101 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 3102 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school districts that are actively seeking, evaluating, or implementing math/algebra technology or curriculum from these search results.

 3103 +

 3104 + INCLUDE:

 3105 + - Districts adopting or piloting math/algebra technology platforms

 3106 + - Districts posting RFPs for math curriculum or technology

 3107 + - Districts implementing game-based or adaptive math programs

 3108 + - Districts with new math initiatives, algebra intervention programs

 3109 + - Districts expanding math technology to more grades/schools

 3110 + - Districts with math curriculum adoption cycles underway

 3111 +

 3112 + EXCLUDE:

 3113 + - General math education news without a specific district taking action

 3114 + - College/university programs

 3115 + - State-level policy without district-specific action

 3116 + - Assessment-only tools (state testing, benchmarking)

 3117 + - Districts just talking about math scores without taking procurement action

 3118 +

 3119 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 3120 + {{

 3121 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 3122 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 3123 + "action_type" : "adoption | pilot | rfp | expansion | initiative" ,

 3124 + "what_theyre_doing" : "1 sentence: what math/algebra action they are taking" ,

 3125 + "headline" : "[district] ([state]): [action summary]"

 3126 + }}

 3127 +

 3128 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 3129 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 3130 +

 3131 + Search results:

 3132 + {combined_text} """

 3133 +

 3134 + response = client.messages.create(

 3135 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 3136 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 3137 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 3138 + )

 3139 + _track_usage(response)

 3140 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 3141 + except Exception as e:

 3142 + logger.error( f"Claude algebra extraction failed: {e} " )

 3143 + return []

 3144 +

 3145 + try :

 3146 + clean = raw_text

 3147 + if "```" in clean:

 3148 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 3149 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 3150 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 3151 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 3152 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 3153 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 3154 + logger.warning( "Algebra scan: no JSON array in response" )

 3155 + return []

 3156 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 3157 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 3158 + logger.warning( f"Algebra scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 3159 + return []

 3160 +

 3161 + signals = []

 3162 + dedup_seen = set ()

 3163 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 3164 +

 3165 + for item in items:

 3166 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 3167 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 3168 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 3169 + continue

 3170 +

 3171 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 3172 + if nces_state:

 3173 + state = nces_state

 3174 +

 3175 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 3176 + if norm_district in dedup_seen:

 3177 + continue

 3178 + dedup_seen.add(norm_district)

 3179 +

 3180 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 3181 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 3182 + heat = compute_heat_score( "curriculum" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 3183 + # Boost: districts actively buying math curriculum are hot targets for AI Algebra

 3184 + action_type = (item.get( "action_type" ) or "" ).strip().lower()

 3185 + if action_type in ( "rfp" , "pilot" , "adoption" ):

 3186 + heat = min (heat + 15 , 100 )

 3187 +

 3188 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f" {district} : math/algebra signal" ).strip()

 3189 + msg_id = f"algebra_ {norm_district} _ {year_month} "

 3190 +

 3191 + signals.append({

 3192 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 3193 + "source" : "algebra_scan" ,

 3194 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {action_type or 'math' } " ,

 3195 + "signal_type" : "curriculum" ,

 3196 + "scope" : "district" ,

 3197 + "district" : district,

 3198 + "state" : state,

 3199 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 3200 + "dollar_amount" : "" ,

 3201 + "tier" : 1 ,

 3202 + "heat_score" : heat,

 3203 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 3204 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 3205 + "url" : "" ,

 3206 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 3207 + })

 3208 +

 3209 + logger.info( f"Algebra scan: { len (signals)} math/algebra campaign targets extracted "

 3210 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 3211 + if progress_callback:

 3212 + progress_callback( f"Algebra scan: { len (signals)} targets found" )

 3213 + return signals

 3214 +

 3216 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 3217 + # CYBERSECURITY PRE-LAUNCH SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 3218 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 3219 +

 3220 + def scan_cybersecurity_targets ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 3221 + """

 3222 + Scan for K- 12 districts with CTE cybersecurity programs or starting new ones.

 3223 + Pre-launch pipeline building for Cybersecurity course (fall 2026 ).

 3224 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 3225 + """

 3226 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 3227 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan cybersecurity targets" )

 3228 + return []

 3229 +

 3230 + import httpx

 3231 +

 3232 + _load_nces_lookup()

 3233 + _load_cross_references()

 3234 +

 3235 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 3236 + all_snippets = []

 3237 + seen_urls = set ()

 3238 +

 3239 + if progress_callback:

 3240 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for CTE cybersecurity programs..." )

 3241 +

 3242 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 3243 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 3244 + queries = [

 3245 + f'("cybersecurity" OR "cyber security") ("CTE" OR "career technical" OR "pathway") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 3246 + f'("cybersecurity" OR "networking" OR "information technology") ("teacher" OR "instructor" OR "program") K-12 school " {state_name} "' ,

 3247 + f'("cybersecurity curriculum" OR "cyber education" OR "cybersecurity certification") K-12 school district " {state_name} "' ,

 3248 + ]

 3249 + for query in queries:

 3250 + try :

 3251 + resp = httpx.post(

 3252 + SERPER_URL,

 3253 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 3254 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:y" }, # Wider window — pre-launch research

 3255 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 3256 + )

 3257 + data = resp.json()

 3258 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 3259 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 3260 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 3261 + seen_urls.add(url)

 3262 + all_snippets.append({

 3263 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 3264 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 3265 + "url" : url,

 3266 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 3267 + })

 3268 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 3269 + except Exception as e:

 3270 + logger.warning( f"Serper cybersecurity scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 3271 +

 3272 + if not all_snippets:

 3273 + logger.info( "Cybersecurity scan: no results found" )

 3274 + if progress_callback:

 3275 + progress_callback( "Cybersecurity scan: no results found." )

 3276 + return []

 3277 +

 3278 + logger.info( f"Cybersecurity scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 3279 +

 3280 + combined_text = ""

 3281 + for s in all_snippets:

 3282 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 3283 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 3284 +

 3285 + if progress_callback:

 3286 + progress_callback( f"Extracting cybersecurity targets from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 3287 +

 3288 + import anthropic

 3289 + try :

 3290 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 3291 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school districts that have CTE cybersecurity programs, are starting cybersecurity pathways, or are hiring cybersecurity/networking teachers from these search

 + results.

 3292 +

 3293 + INCLUDE:

 3294 + - Districts with existing CTE cybersecurity pathways or programs

 3295 + - Districts launching new cybersecurity/networking CTE programs

 3296 + - Districts hiring cybersecurity or networking teachers/instructors

 3297 + - Districts with IT/cybersecurity certification programs (CompTIA, Cisco, etc.)

 3298 + - Career academies or tech high schools with cybersecurity focus

 3299 + - Districts receiving grants for cybersecurity education

 3300 +

 3301 + EXCLUDE:

 3302 + - District IT security incidents (hacking, data breaches) — that 's the district being attacked, not teaching cybersecurity

 3303 + - College/university cybersecurity programs

 3304 + - General CTE news without cybersecurity specifics

 3305 + - K- 12 cybersecurity policy/compliance ( not curriculum)

 3306 +

 3307 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 3308 + {{

 3309 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 3310 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 3311 + "program_type" : "existing_program | new_program | hiring | certification | grant" ,

 3312 + "what_they_have" : "1 sentence: what cybersecurity program or initiative they have" ,

 3313 + "headline" : "[district] ([state]): [cybersecurity program summary]"

 3314 + }}

 3315 +

 3316 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 3317 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 3318 +

 3319 + Search results:

 3320 + {combined_text} """

 3321 +

 3322 + response = client.messages.create(

 3323 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 3324 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 3325 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 3326 + )

 3327 + _track_usage(response)

 3328 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 3329 + except Exception as e:

 3330 + logger.error( f"Claude cybersecurity extraction failed: {e} " )

 3331 + return []

 3332 +

 3333 + try :

 3334 + clean = raw_text

 3335 + if "```" in clean:

 3336 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 3337 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 3338 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 3339 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 3340 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 3341 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 3342 + logger.warning( "Cybersecurity scan: no JSON array in response" )

 3343 + return []

 3344 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 3345 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 3346 + logger.warning( f"Cybersecurity scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 3347 + return []

 3348 +

 3349 + signals = []

 3350 + dedup_seen = set ()

 3351 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 3352 +

 3353 + for item in items:

 3354 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 3355 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 3356 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 3357 + continue

 3358 +

 3359 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 3360 + if nces_state:

 3361 + state = nces_state

 3362 +

 3363 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 3364 + if norm_district in dedup_seen:

 3365 + continue

 3366 + dedup_seen.add(norm_district)

 3367 +

 3368 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 3369 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 3370 + heat = compute_heat_score( "hiring" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status) # hiring weight

 3371 + # Boost: existing programs are ideal targets for new curriculum

 3372 + program_type = (item.get( "program_type" ) or "" ).strip().lower()

 3373 + if program_type in ( "existing_program" , "certification" ):

 3374 + heat = min (heat + 10 , 100 )

 3375 +

 3376 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f" {district} : cybersecurity CTE" ).strip()

 3377 + msg_id = f"cybersecurity_ {norm_district} _ {year_month} "

 3378 +

 3379 + signals.append({

 3380 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 3381 + "source" : "cybersecurity_scan" ,

 3382 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {program_type or 'cybersecurity' } " ,

 3383 + "signal_type" : "curriculum" ,

 3384 + "scope" : "district" ,

 3385 + "district" : district,

 3386 + "state" : state,

 3387 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 3388 + "dollar_amount" : "" ,

 3389 + "tier" : 1 ,

 3390 + "heat_score" : heat,

 3391 + "urgency" : "routine" , # Pre-launch — building pipeline, not urgent

 3392 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 3393 + "url" : "" ,

 3394 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 3395 + })

 3396 +

 3397 + logger.info( f"Cybersecurity scan: { len (signals)} CTE cybersecurity targets extracted "

 3398 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 3399 + if progress_callback:

 3400 + progress_callback( f"Cybersecurity scan: { len (signals)} targets found" )

 3401 + return signals

 3402 +

 3403 +

 3404 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 3405 # RSS FEED INGESTION

 3406 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 + get scan, Algebra scan, Cybersecurity scan ). 22 Telegram commands. Daily 7:45 AM scan + weekly Monday (leadership 8 AM, RFP 8:15 AM) + monthly 1st Monday (legislation 8:30 AM , grants 8:45 AM, bu

 202 **ESA_PATTERNS in target_roles.py has 78 entity name variations.** From Steven's ROLES and KEYWORDS doc. Covers ESC, BOCES, IU, COE, ROE, ISC, ESU, AEA, CESA, SELPA, JPA, SSA, and dozens more.

 204 - **`signal_processor.py` is a flat module imported at top of main.py.** 10 signal sources: Google Alerts (regex), Burbio (Claude), DOE (Claude), RSS (feedparser), BoardDocs (HTTP scraping), Ball

 - otpedia (HTTP scraping), Job postings (JobSpy), Leadership scan (Serper + Claude), RFP scan (Serper + Claude), Legislative scan (Serper + Claude). Signals Database tab (18 columns including Pip

 - eline Link). 16 Telegram commands, all direct-dispatch. Daily scan at 7:45 AM CST. Weekly Monday: leadership 8 AM + RFP 8:15 AM. Monthly 1st Monday: legislation 8:30 AM. All ~$0.03/scan each. B

 - oardDocs/Ballotpedia/RSS wrapped in try/except (non-fatal). `_last_signal_batch` is in-memory — run `/signals` before `/signal_act` or `/signal_info` in a new session.

 204 + **`signal_processor.py` is a flat module imported at top of main.py.** 14 signal sources: Google Alerts (regex), Burbio (Claude), DOE (Claude), RSS (feedparser), BoardDocs (HTTP scraping), Ball

 + otpedia (HTTP scraping), Job postings (JobSpy), Leadership scan (Serper + Claude), RFP scan (Serper + Claude), Legislative scan (Serper + Claude) , Grant scan (Serper + Claude), Budget scan (Ser

 + per + Claude), Algebra scan (Serper + Claude), Cybersecurity scan (Serper + Claude) . Signals Database tab (18 columns including Pipeline Link). 22 Telegram commands, all direct-dispatch. Daily

 + scan at 7:45 AM CST. Weekly Monday: leadership 8 AM + RFP 8:15 AM. Monthly 1st Monday: legislation 8:30 AM + grants 8:45 AM + budget 9:00 AM . Algebra/cybersecurity scans are on-demand only (`/s

 + ignal_algebra`, `/signal_cyber`). All ~$0.03/scan each. BoardDocs/Ballotpedia/RSS wrapped in try/except (non-fatal). `_last_signal_batch` is in-memory — run `/signals` before `/signal_act` or `

 + /signal_info` in a new session.

 206 **Signal enrichment must run before acting on signals.** Never queue a district based on a headline alone. `enrich_signal()` does Serper web search + Claude Haiku analysis for CodeCombat releva

 nce (strong/moderate/weak/none). A $6.2B bond can be WEAK if it's all devices. A no-dollar STEAM coordinator hire can be STRONG. Auto-runs on Tier 1 during daily scans; manual via `/signal_enri

 ch N`.

 3027 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 3028 + # AI ALGEBRA CAMPAIGN SCANNER (Serper + Claude)

 3029 + # ─────────────────────────────────────────────

 3030 +

 3031 + def scan_algebra_targets ( states= None , progress_callback= None ) -> list :

 3032 + """

 3033 + Scan for K- 12 districts actively seeking math/algebra technology or curriculum.

 3034 + Targets for the AI Algebra product (launched via AI Hackstack).

 3035 + Uses Serper + Claude Haiku. Returns list of signal dicts. Cost: ~$ 0.03 /scan.

 3036 + """

 3037 + if not SERPER_API_KEY:

 3038 + logger.warning( "SERPER_API_KEY not set — cannot scan algebra targets" )

 3039 + return []

 3040 +

 3041 + import httpx

 3042 +

 3043 + _load_nces_lookup()

 3044 + _load_cross_references()

 3045 +

 3046 + scan_states = states or list (TERRITORY_STATES)

 3047 + all_snippets = []

 3048 + seen_urls = set ()

 3049 +

 3050 + if progress_callback:

 3051 + progress_callback( f"Searching { len (scan_states)} states for math/algebra curriculum signals..." )

 3052 +

 3053 + for state_abbr in scan_states:

 3054 + state_name = ABBR_TO_STATE_NAME.get(state_abbr, state_abbr)

 3055 + queries = [

 3056 + f'("math curriculum" OR "algebra curriculum") ("adoption" OR "pilot" OR "evaluate" OR "implement") school district " {state_name} " 2026' ,

 3057 + f'("math technology" OR "adaptive math" OR "game-based math" OR "math intervention") K-12 school district " {state_name} "' ,

 3058 + f'("algebra" OR "mathematics") ("RFP" OR "request for proposal" OR "technology pilot") school district " {state_name} "' ,

 3059 + ]

 3060 + for query in queries:

 3061 + try :

 3062 + resp = httpx.post(

 3063 + SERPER_URL,

 3064 + headers={ "X-API-Key" : SERPER_API_KEY, "Content-Type" : "application/json" },

 3065 + json={ "q" : query, "num" : 10 , "tbs" : "qdr:m" },

 3066 + timeout= 15.0 ,

 3067 + )

 3068 + data = resp.json()

 3069 + for item in data.get( "organic" , [])[: 10 ]:

 3070 + url = item.get( "link" , "" )

 3071 + if url and url not in seen_urls:

 3072 + seen_urls.add(url)

 3073 + all_snippets.append({

 3074 + "title" : item.get( "title" , "" ),

 3075 + "snippet" : item.get( "snippet" , "" ),

 3076 + "url" : url,

 3077 + "searched_state" : state_abbr,

 3078 + })

 3079 + time.sleep( 0.5 )

 3080 + except Exception as e:

 3081 + logger.warning( f"Serper algebra scan failed for {state_abbr} : {e} " )

 3082 +

 3083 + if not all_snippets:

 3084 + logger.info( "Algebra scan: no results found" )

 3085 + if progress_callback:

 3086 + progress_callback( "Algebra scan: no results found." )

 3087 + return []

 3088 +

 3089 + logger.info( f"Algebra scan: { len (all_snippets)} articles from { len (scan_states)} states" )

 3090 +

 3091 + combined_text = ""

 3092 + for s in all_snippets:

 3093 + combined_text += f"\n[ {s[ 'searched_state' ]} ] {s[ 'title' ]} \n {s[ 'snippet' ]} \nURL: {s[ 'url' ]} \n"

 3094 + combined_text = combined_text[: 12000 ]

 3095 +

 3096 + if progress_callback:

 3097 + progress_callback( f"Extracting algebra campaign targets from { len (all_snippets)} articles..." )

 3098 +

 3099 + import anthropic

 3100 + try :

 3101 + client = anthropic.Anthropic(timeout= 90.0 )

 3102 + prompt = f"""Extract K-12 school districts that are actively seeking, evaluating, or implementing math/algebra technology or curriculum from these search results.

 3103 +

 3104 + INCLUDE:

 3105 + - Districts adopting or piloting math/algebra technology platforms

 3106 + - Districts posting RFPs for math curriculum or technology

 3107 + - Districts implementing game-based or adaptive math programs

 3108 + - Districts with new math initiatives, algebra intervention programs

 3109 + - Districts expanding math technology to more grades/schools

 3110 + - Districts with math curriculum adoption cycles underway

 3111 +

 3112 + EXCLUDE:

 3113 + - General math education news without a specific district taking action

 3114 + - College/university programs

 3115 + - State-level policy without district-specific action

 3116 + - Assessment-only tools (state testing, benchmarking)

 3117 + - Districts just talking about math scores without taking procurement action

 3118 +

 3119 + Return a JSON array. Each item:

 3120 + {{

 3121 + "district" : "Exact district name" ,

 3122 + "state" : "2-letter state code" ,

 3123 + "action_type" : "adoption | pilot | rfp | expansion | initiative" ,

 3124 + "what_theyre_doing" : "1 sentence: what math/algebra action they are taking" ,

 3125 + "headline" : "[district] ([state]): [action summary]"

 3126 + }}

 3127 +

 3128 + If nothing qualifies after filtering, return [].

 3129 + Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no commentary.

 3130 +

 3131 + Search results:

 3132 + {combined_text} """

 3133 +

 3134 + response = client.messages.create(

 3135 + model= "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ,

 3136 + max_tokens= 2000 ,

 3137 + messages=[{ "role" : "user" , "content" : prompt}],

 3138 + )

 3139 + _track_usage(response)

 3140 + raw_text = response.content[ 0 ].text.strip()

 3141 + except Exception as e:

 3142 + logger.error( f"Claude algebra extraction failed: {e} " )

 3143 + return []

 3144 +

 3145 + try :

 3146 + clean = raw_text

 3147 + if "```" in clean:

 3148 + clean = clean.split( "```" )[ 1 ]

 3149 + if clean.startswith( "json" ):

 3150 + clean = clean[ 4 :]

 3151 + start = clean.find( "[" )

 3152 + end = clean.rfind( "]" )

 3153 + if start == - 1 or end == - 1 :

 3154 + logger.warning( "Algebra scan: no JSON array in response" )

 3155 + return []

 3156 + items = json.loads(clean[start:end + 1 ])

 3157 + except json.JSONDecodeError as e:

 3158 + logger.warning( f"Algebra scan JSON parse failed: {e} " )

 3159 + return []

 3160 +

 3161 + signals = []

 3162 + dedup_seen = set ()

 3163 + year_month = datetime.now().strftime( "%Y_%m" )

 3164 +

 3165 + for item in items:

 3166 + district = (item.get( "district" ) or "" ).strip()

 3167 + state = (item.get( "state" ) or "" ).strip().upper()

 3168 + if not district or not state or len (state) != 2 :

 3169 + continue

 3170 +

 3171 + nces_state = lookup_district_state(district)

 3172 + if nces_state:

 3173 + state = nces_state

 3174 +

 3175 + norm_district = csv_importer.normalize_name(district)

 3176 + if norm_district in dedup_seen:

 3177 + continue

 3178 + dedup_seen.add(norm_district)

 3179 +

 3180 + in_territory = state in TERRITORY_STATES

 3181 + cust_status = check_customer_status(district)

 3182 + heat = compute_heat_score( "curriculum" , 1 , in_territory, cust_status)

 3183 + # Boost: districts actively buying math curriculum are hot targets for AI Algebra

 3184 + action_type = (item.get( "action_type" ) or "" ).strip().lower()

 3185 + if action_type in ( "rfp" , "pilot" , "adoption" ):

 3186 + heat = min (heat + 15 , 100 )

 3187 +

 3188 + headline = (item.get( "headline" ) or f" {district} : math/algebra signal" ).strip()

 3189 + msg_id = f"algebra_ {norm_district} _ {year_month} "

 3190 +

 3191 + signals.append({

 3192 + "date" : datetime.now().strftime( "%Y-%m-%d" ),

 3193 + "source" : "algebra_scan" ,

 3194 + "source_detail" : f"Serper — {action_type or 'math' } " ,

 3195 + "signal_type" : "curriculum" ,

 3196 + "scope" : "district" ,

 3197 + "district" : district,

 3198 + "state" : state,

 3199 + "headline" : headline[: 200 ],

 3200 + "dollar_amount" : "" ,

 3201 + "tier" : 1 ,

 3202 + "heat_score" : heat,

 3203 + "urgency" : "time_sensitive" ,

 3204 + "customer_status" : cust_status,

 3205 + "url" : "" ,

 3206 + "message_id" : msg_id,

 3207 + })

 3208 +

 3209 + logger.info( f"Algebra scan: { len (signals)} math/algebra campaign targets extracted "

 3210 + f"( { len (items)} raw, { len (items) - len (signals)} filtered/deduped)" )

 3211 + if progress_callback:

 3212 + progress_callback( f"Algebra scan: { len (signals)} targets found" )

 3213 + return signals

 3028 + except Exception as e:

 3029 + await send_message( f"Algebra scan failed: {e} " )

 3030 + return

 3031 +

 3032 + elif user_text.lower() in [ "/signal_cyber" , "signal cyber" , "scan cybersecurity" ]:

 3033 + await send_message( " 🛡️ Scanning for CTE cybersecurity program targets (pre-launch pipeline)..." )

 3034 + try :

 3035 + loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()

 3036 + cyber_signals = await loop.run_in_executor(

 3037 + None , signal_processor.scan_cybersecurity_targets, None , None )

 3038 + if cyber_signals:

 3039 + write_result = await loop.run_in_executor(

 3040 + None , signal_processor.write_signals, cyber_signals)

 3041 + lines = [ f" 🛡️ *Cybersecurity Campaign Scan* — { len (cyber_signals)} targets found\n" ]

 3042 + for i, sig in enumerate (cyber_signals[: 10 ], 1 ):

 3043 + dist = sig.get( "district" , "" )

 3044 + state = sig.get( "state" , "" )

 3045 + headline = sig.get( "headline" , "" )[: 80 ]

 3046 + lines.append( f" {i} . {dist} ( {state} ) — {headline} " )

 3047 + if len (cyber_signals) > 10 :

 3048 + lines.append( f"\n ... and { len (cyber_signals) - 10 } more" )

 3049 + lines.append( f"\nWritten: {write_result[ 'written' ]} | Deduped: {write_result[ 'skipped' ]} " )

 3050 + await send_message( "\n" .join(lines))

 3051 + else :

 3052 + await send_message( "No CTE cybersecurity program targets found." )

 3053 + except Exception as e:

 3054 + await send_message( f"Cybersecurity scan failed: {e} " )

 3055 + return

 3056 +

 3057 elif user_text.lower() in [ "/signal_scan" , "signal scan" , "scan signals" ]:

 3058 await send_message( "📬 Starting signal scan... This may take a few minutes." )

 202 **ESA_PATTERNS in target_roles.py has 78 entity name variations.** From Steven's ROLES and KEYWORDS doc. Covers ESC, BOCES, IU, COE, ROE, ISC, ESU, AEA, CESA, SELPA, JPA, SSA, and dozens more.

 204 - **`signal_processor.py` is a flat module imported at top of main.py.** 10 signal sources: Google Alerts (regex), Burbio (Claude), DOE (Claude), RSS (feedparser), BoardDocs (HTTP scraping), Ball

 - otpedia (HTTP scraping), Job postings (JobSpy), Leadership scan (Serper + Claude), RFP scan (Serper + Claude), Legislative scan (Serper + Claude). Signals Database tab (18 columns including Pip

 - eline Link). 16 Telegram commands, all direct-dispatch. Daily scan at 7:45 AM CST. Weekly Monday: leadership 8 AM + RFP 8:15 AM. Monthly 1st Monday: legislation 8:30 AM. All ~$0.03/scan each. B

 - oardDocs/Ballotpedia/RSS wrapped in try/except (non-fatal). `_last_signal_batch` is in-memory — run `/signals` before `/signal_act` or `/signal_info` in a new session.

 204 + **`signal_processor.py` is a flat module imported at top of main.py.** 14 signal sources: Google Alerts (regex), Burbio (Claude), DOE (Claude), RSS (feedparser), BoardDocs (HTTP scraping), Ball

 + otpedia (HTTP scraping), Job postings (JobSpy), Leadership scan (Serper + Claude), RFP scan (Serper + Claude), Legislative scan (Serper + Claude) , Grant scan (Serper + Claude), Budget scan (Ser

 + per + Claude), Algebra scan (Serper + Claude), Cybersecurity scan (Serper + Claude) . Signals Database tab (18 columns including Pipeline Link). 22 Telegram commands, all direct-dispatch. Daily

 + scan at 7:45 AM CST. Weekly Monday: leadership 8 AM + RFP 8:15 AM. Monthly 1st Monday: legislation 8:30 AM + grants 8:45 AM + budget 9:00 AM . Algebra/cybersecurity scans are on-demand only (`/s

 + ignal_algebra`, `/signal_cyber`). All ~$0.03/scan each. BoardDocs/Ballotpedia/RSS wrapped in try/except (non-fatal). `_last_signal_batch` is in-memory — run `/signals` before `/signal_act` or `

 + /signal_info` in a new session.

 206 **Signal enrichment must run before acting on signals.** Never queue a district based on a headline alone. `enrich_signal()` does Serper web search + Claude Haiku analysis for CodeCombat releva

 nce (strong/moderate/weak/none). A $6.2B bond can be WEAK if it's all devices. A no-dollar STEAM coordinator hire can be STRONG. Auto-runs on Tier 1 during daily scans; manual via `/signal_enri

 ch N`.
